channel.title: Dark Web Informer
channel.description: A real-time cyber threat intelligence platform that monitors the dark web and clearnet for data breaches, ransomware campaigns, darknet market activity, leaked databases, and active threat actors.

item.title: Daily Dose of Dark Web Informer - April 27th, 2026
item.description: This daily article is intended to make it easier for those who want to stay updated with my regular Dark Web Informer and X/Twitter posts.
item.dc:creator: Dark Web Informer
item.content:encoded:
Dark Web Informer

Daily Threat Intelligence Digest

⚡ Real-Time Monitoring
🔑
API Access Available

High-volume threat intelligence, ransomware data, IOC exports, and comprehensive feed access for security teams and researchers.

Explore API →
🔁 Follow across all official platforms — darkwebinformer.com/socials
🔥
Advertising Opportunities

Reach a highly engaged audience of 75,300+ unique users monthly and growing. View details

75.3k
Unique Visitors
154.1k
Pageviews

Last 30 days as of Mar 30, 2026. Next update Apr 30th.

🔒

Unlock Premium Intelligence

Real-time breach tracking, expert analysis, high-resolution evidence, unredacted feeds, and 5,100+ blog posts. View all plans and features on the pricing page.

View Plans & Subscribe →

📌 Legend

📰Law Enforcement — LEA updates, investigations
⚠️Dark Web Notices — forums, markets, announcements
❗️Urgent Threats — breaches, ransomware, vulnerabilities
💡Insights & Tools — guides, OSINT, learning resources
🔒Subscribers Only — X/Twitter subscribe

🧾 Today's Intelligence

Threat Intelligence
❗️
Den kulturelle skolesekken (DKS) Database Breached: 1,389,534 Records Exposed from Norway's National Cultural-Schoolbag Programme FREE
❗️
LCBO (Liquor Control Board of Ontario) Database Breached: 165,840 Customer Records Exposed from Ontario's Crown Corporation FREE
X/Twitter Updates
❗️
The Ministerio de Trabajo y Previsión Social (Ministry of Labor and Social Welfare of Guatemala) has allegedly been breached, with 200,000+ user records and 40 GB of resume PDFs up for sale on a popular cybercrime forum.
❗️
CTT (Correios de Portugal), Portugal's national postal carrier, has allegedly been breached, with customer data and internal infrastructure details from its Locky smart parcel locker network leaked on a popular cybercrime forum.
❗️
Uganda's Ministry of Agriculture, Animal Industry and Fisheries (MAAIF) has allegedly been breached, with its E-Extension System database leaked on a popular cybercrime forum.
❗️
Bordeaux Métropole's tourist tax (taxe de séjour) system has allegedly been breached, with a partial database covering 11,000 accommodations leaked on a popular cybercrime forum.
💡
Telegram scraper script will have a viewer you can use sometime on Friday. It will be uploaded to the same repo at: https://github.com/DarkWebInformer/telegram-scraper
❗️
Choice Health Insurance has allegedly been breached, with 2.1 million client and patient records leaked on a popular cybercrime forum. The actor claims the leak also affects other major U.S. healthcare providers including Humana, United Healthcare, Anthem, WellCare, and
❗️
The University of Kerbala (http://uokerbala.edu.iq), an Iraqi public university, has allegedly been breached, with G Suite user data leaked on a popular cybercrime forum.
❗️
1/2 The Oyo State Ministry of Trade, Industry, Investment and Cooperatives (oyostatecommerce) has allegedly been breached, with 275,000 commerce identity card images leaked on a popular cybercrime forum for free.
❗️
313 Team is claiming a DDoS attack on eBay Japan and eBay US
❗️
https://x.com/DarkWebInformer/status/2048822956164296967?s=20
❗️
TotalEnergies, a major French energy company that produces and sells oil, gas, and renewable energy, has allegedly been breached, with 79,000 customer records up for sale on a popular cybercrime forum.
❗️
Checkmarx confirms GitHub repository data posted...
❗️
The University of San Carlos of Guatemala (USAC) has allegedly been breached, with employee financial information from its SIIF system leaked on a popular cybercrime forum.
💡
Arkham script is monitoring over 1,000 cybercrime wallets and Government wallets. The alert threshold is anything over $1,000,000 USD. Alerts will come to the main TG channel. https://t.me/SliceForLifeee
❗️
Universidad Rafael Landívar, a Jesuit university in Guatemala, has allegedly been breached, with 84,620 photos of students and professors leaked on a popular cybercrime forum.
❗️
A threat actor is allegedly selling a React2Shell exploitation toolkit on a popular cybercrime forum, pitched as a way to mass-scan, exploit, and dump databases from vulnerable React-based servers.
❗️
A threat actor is allegedly selling a full backup of an unnamed crypto B2B affiliate company on a popular cybercrime forum, containing 46 separate product databases tied to crypto, NFT, and AI agent platforms. Pricing starts at $30,000.
❗️
The MORENA political movement in Tabasco, Mexico has allegedly been breached, with founder records and ID images leaked on a popular cybercrime forum.
💡
This is the only way.

darkwebinformer.com · socials · subscribe

© Dark Web Informer. All rights reserved.

item.title: LCBO (Liquor Control Board of Ontario) Database Breached: 165,840 Customer Records Exposed from Ontario's Crown Corporation
item.description: LCBO (Liquor Control Board of Ontario) Database Breached: 165,840 Customer Records Exposed from Ontario's Crown Corporation
item.dc:creator: Dark Web Informer
item.content:encoded:
<!--kg-card-begin: html-->
<meta name="description" content="Threat actor Spirigatito has leaked the database of LCBO (Liquor Control Board of Ontario), the Government of Ontario's Crown corporation and one of the world's largest beverage alcohol retailers, exposing 165,840 customer records.">
<meta name="keywords" content="LCBO, Liquor Control Board of Ontario, Spirigatito, Canada, Ontario, government breach, Crown corporation, data leak, threat intelligence">
<meta name="author" content="Dark Web Informer">

<style>

.dwi-report{
  --dwir-card:#ffffff;
  --dwir-surface:#f7f8fa;
  --dwir-surface-2:#eef0f4;
  --dwir-surface-3:#e3e6ec;
  --dwir-border:#e4e7ed;
  --dwir-border-bright:#d2d7df;
  --dwir-text:#0f1419;
  --dwir-text-soft:#384152;
  --dwir-text-mute:#5b6573;
  --dwir-text-faint:#8a93a3;
  --dwir-brand:#1d6fe0;
  --dwir-brand-dim:#1558b5;
  --dwir-brand-soft:rgba(29,111,224,0.08);
  --dwir-brand-border:rgba(29,111,224,0.2);
  --dwir-critical:#c8312c;
  --dwir-critical-soft:rgba(200,49,44,0.07);
  --dwir-critical-border:rgba(200,49,44,0.22);
  --dwir-score-1:#1a3a6b;
  --dwir-score-2:#2956a3;
  --dwir-score-3:#3672d1;
  --dwir-score-4:#1d6fe0;
  --dwir-score-5:#0d5bc2;
  --dwir-score-accent-soft:rgba(29,111,224,0.08);
  --dwir-warn:#b86e14;
  --dwir-warn-soft:rgba(184,110,20,0.08);
  --dwir-warn-border:rgba(184,110,20,0.25);
  --dwir-success:#2f8040;
  --dwir-success-soft:rgba(47,128,64,0.07);
  --dwir-success-border:rgba(47,128,64,0.22);
  --dwir-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,20,25,0.06),0 6px 24px rgba(15,20,25,0.08);
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark){
  .dwi-report:not([data-dwir-theme="light"]){
    --dwir-card:#10131a;
    --dwir-surface:#161a22;
    --dwir-surface-2:#1d222c;
    --dwir-surface-3:#252b37;
    --dwir-border:#252a33;
    --dwir-border-bright:#343b48;
    --dwir-text:#e6e9ef;
    --dwir-text-soft:#b8bdc7;
    --dwir-text-mute:#8089a0;
    --dwir-text-faint:#5a6378;
    --dwir-brand:#4d9eff;
    --dwir-brand-dim:#3a7dd1;
    --dwir-brand-soft:rgba(77,158,255,0.09);
    --dwir-brand-border:rgba(77,158,255,0.22);
    --dwir-critical:#e5484d;
    --dwir-critical-soft:rgba(229,72,77,0.1);
    --dwir-critical-border:rgba(229,72,77,0.28);
    --dwir-warn:#f2a535;
    --dwir-warn-soft:rgba(242,165,53,0.1);
    --dwir-warn-border:rgba(242,165,53,0.3);
    --dwir-success:#46a758;
    --dwir-success-soft:rgba(70,167,88,0.1);
    --dwir-success-border:rgba(70,167,88,0.28);
    --dwir-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.25),0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  }
}

.dwi-report[data-dwir-theme="dark"]{
  --dwir-card:#10131a;
  --dwir-surface:#161a22;
  --dwir-surface-2:#1d222c;
  --dwir-surface-3:#252b37;
  --dwir-border:#252a33;
  --dwir-border-bright:#343b48;
  --dwir-text:#e6e9ef;
  --dwir-text-soft:#b8bdc7;
  --dwir-text-mute:#8089a0;
  --dwir-text-faint:#5a6378;
  --dwir-brand:#4d9eff;
  --dwir-brand-dim:#3a7dd1;
  --dwir-brand-soft:rgba(77,158,255,0.09);
  --dwir-brand-border:rgba(77,158,255,0.22);
  --dwir-critical:#e5484d;
  --dwir-critical-soft:rgba(229,72,77,0.1);
  --dwir-critical-border:rgba(229,72,77,0.28);
  --dwir-score-1:#2c4770;
  --dwir-score-2:#3b67a8;
  --dwir-score-3:#4a8ae0;
  --dwir-score-4:#5ca9ff;
  --dwir-score-5:#7dc4ff;
  --dwir-score-accent-soft:rgba(92,169,255,0.1);
  --dwir-warn:#f2a535;
  --dwir-warn-soft:rgba(242,165,53,0.1);
  --dwir-warn-border:rgba(242,165,53,0.3);
  --dwir-success:#46a758;
  --dwir-success-soft:rgba(70,167,88,0.1);
  --dwir-success-border:rgba(70,167,88,0.28);
  --dwir-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.25),0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
}

.dwi-report{
  font-family:'Inter',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;
  max-width:920px;
  margin:32px auto;
  background:var(--dwir-card);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:12px;
  box-shadow:var(--dwir-shadow);
  overflow:hidden;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  line-height:1.6;
  font-feature-settings:"kern","ss01","cv11";
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
  transition:background-color .2s ease,border-color .2s ease;
}
.dwi-report *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}

.dwi-topbar{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  padding:10px 32px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  letter-spacing:0.02em;
}
.dwi-topbar-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;color:var(--dwir-text-soft)}
.dwi-topbar-status::before{
  content:'';
  width:6px;height:6px;
  background:var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:50%;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--dwir-critical-soft);
}
.dwi-topbar-right{color:var(--dwir-text-faint)}

.dwi-header{padding:48px 40px 36px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border)}
.dwi-breadcrumb{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  margin-bottom:28px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.dwi-breadcrumb a{color:var(--dwir-text-mute);text-decoration:none;transition:color .15s}
.dwi-breadcrumb a:hover{color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-breadcrumb i{font-size:9px;color:var(--dwir-text-faint)}
.dwi-breadcrumb .current{color:var(--dwir-text-soft)}

.dwi-report-label{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:10px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  letter-spacing:0.15em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:6px 12px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-brand-border);
  border-radius:4px;
  margin-bottom:24px;
}

.dwi-title{
  font-size:clamp(26px,3.5vw,36px);
  font-weight:700;
  line-height:1.2;
  letter-spacing:-0.02em;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  margin-bottom:20px;
  max-width:780px;
}

.dwi-summary{
  font-family:'Source Serif 4',Georgia,serif;
  font-size:18px;
  line-height:1.6;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  max-width:720px;
  margin-bottom:32px;
  font-weight:400;
}
.dwi-summary strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}

.dwi-meta{
  display:flex;
  gap:28px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  padding-top:24px;
  border-top:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-meta-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
.dwi-meta-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:10px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text-faint);
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
}
.dwi-meta-value{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--dwir-text)}

.dwi-content{padding:40px}

.dwi-severity{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-left:3px solid var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:6px;
  padding:20px 24px;
  margin-bottom:36px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:20px;
}
.dwi-severity-icon{
  width:40px;height:40px;
  flex-shrink:0;
  background:var(--dwir-critical-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-critical-border);
  border-radius:8px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:var(--dwir-critical);
  font-size:16px;
}
.dwi-severity-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-critical);
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:4px;
}
.dwi-severity-text{font-size:14px;color:var(--dwir-text-soft);line-height:1.5}
.dwi-severity-text strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}

.dwi-api-promo{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  padding:18px 22px;
  margin-bottom:28px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:20px;
  transition:border-color .15s;
}
.dwi-api-promo:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-api-promo-content{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px}
.dwi-api-promo-icon{
  width:36px;height:36px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-brand-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  font-size:14px;
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.dwi-api-promo-text{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px}
.dwi-api-promo-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dwir-text)}
.dwi-api-promo-description{font-size:13px;color:var(--dwir-text-mute);line-height:1.5}

.dwi-btn{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  padding:9px 16px;
  font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:500;
  text-decoration:none;
  border-radius:6px;
  border:1px solid;
  transition:all .15s ease;
  white-space:nowrap;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.dwi-btn-primary{background:var(--dwir-brand);color:#fff;border-color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-btn-primary:hover{background:var(--dwir-brand-dim);border-color:var(--dwir-brand-dim);color:#fff}
.dwi-btn-secondary{background:transparent;color:var(--dwir-text);border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-btn-secondary:hover{background:var(--dwir-surface-2);border-color:var(--dwir-text-faint);color:var(--dwir-text)}
.dwi-btn-warn{background:transparent;color:var(--dwir-warn);border-color:var(--dwir-warn-border)}
.dwi-btn-warn:hover{background:var(--dwir-warn-soft);border-color:var(--dwir-warn);color:var(--dwir-warn)}

.dwi-promo-card{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--dwir-brand-soft) 0%,transparent 60%),var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:8px;
  padding:32px;
  margin-bottom:44px;
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-promo-card::before{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--dwir-brand),transparent);
}
.dwi-promo-badge{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}

.dwi-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}

.dwi-shots{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:16px}

<article class="dwi-report">

  <div class="dwi-topbar">
    <span class="dwi-topbar-status">Active Threat</span>
    <span class="dwi-topbar-right">Report ID: DWI-2026-0427-03</span>
  </div>

  <header class="dwi-header">
    <div class="dwi-report-label">
      <i class="fas fa-file-shield" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      Threat Intelligence Report
    </div>

    <h1 class="dwi-title">LCBO (Liquor Control Board of Ontario) Database Breached: 165,840 Customer Records Exposed from Ontario's Crown Corporation</h1>

    <img src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/9283759827346879256982569872365987237.png" alt="LCBO (Liquor Control Board of Ontario) Database Breached: 165,840 Customer Records Exposed from Ontario's Crown Corporation"><p class="dwi-summary">A threat actor operating under the alias <strong>Spirigatito</strong> has released the customer database of <strong>LCBO</strong> (Liquor Control Board of Ontario), the Government of Ontario's Crown corporation responsible for the retail and wholesale distribution of beverage alcohol throughout the province and one of the largest single retailers of alcohol in the world. The listing claims a breach affecting <strong>165,840 customer records</strong>, with each record containing the customer's name, email address, phone number, and account type.</p>

    <div class="dwi-meta">
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Published</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value"><time datetime="2026-04-27T17:35:20Z">Apr 27, 2026 · 17:35 UTC</time></span>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Origin</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value">Canada (Ontario)</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Sector</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value">Government / Retail (Crown Corporation)</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Read Time</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value">6 min</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <div class="dwi-content">

    
    <div class="dwi-severity" role="region" aria-label="Severity assessment">
      <div class="dwi-severity-icon" aria-hidden="true">
        <i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="dwi-severity-label">Critical Severity</div>
        <p class="dwi-severity-text">A breach of the customer database of <strong>Ontario's provincially-owned alcohol retailer</strong>, exposing 165,840 records containing names, emails, phone numbers, and account types. High risk of targeted phishing, alcohol-themed scams, and impersonation campaigns against verified Canadian consumers.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    
    <aside class="dwi-api-promo api-promo">
      <div class="dwi-api-promo-content">
        <div class="dwi-api-promo-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="fas fa-code"></i></div>
        <div class="dwi-api-promo-text">
          <span class="dwi-api-promo-title">API Access Available</span>
          <span class="dwi-api-promo-description">Threat intelligence endpoints, ransomware feeds, and IOC data for programmatic integration.</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <a href="https://darkwebinformer.com/api-details/" class="dwi-btn dwi-btn-secondary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">View Details <i class="fas fa-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></i></a>
    </aside>

    
    <aside class="dwi-promo-card promo-card">
      <div class="dwi-promo-badge">
        <i class="fas fa-shield-halved" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        Premium Intelligence
      </div>
      <h2 class="dwi-promo-title">Real-time breach tracking, primary-source evidence, and expert analysis.</h2>
      <p class="dwi-promo-description">Built for security professionals, researchers, and journalists. Unlock the complete threat feed, ransomware feed, and original claim URLs.</p>
      <a href="https://darkwebinformer.com/pricing" class="dwi-btn dwi-btn-primary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Subscribe <i class="fas fa-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></i></a>
    </aside>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">01</span>
        <h2>Incident Summary</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-facts">
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Date & Time</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">2026-04-27 17:35 UTC</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Threat Actor</span><span class="dwi-fact-value warn">Spirigatito</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Victim</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">LCBO (lcbo.com)</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Operator</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Government of Ontario</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Industry</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Government / Alcohol Retail</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Category</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Data Breach</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Affected Customers</span><span class="dwi-fact-value critical">165,840</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Scope</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Customer Database</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Account Type</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Retail Customer</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Distribution</span><span class="dwi-fact-value critical">8 forum points</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Network</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Open Web</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Country</span><span class="dwi-fact-value"><svg class="dwi-flag" viewbox="0 0 60 30" aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" preserveaspectratio="none"><rect width="15" height="30" x="0" fill="#FF0000"/><rect width="30" height="30" x="15" fill="#ffffff"/><rect width="15" height="30" x="45" fill="#FF0000"/><path d="M30 7 L31.5 11 L35 11 L32 13 L33 17 L30 14.5 L27 17 L28 13 L25 11 L28.5 11 Z" fill="#FF0000"/></svg> Canada</span></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section dwi-prose">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">02</span>
        <h2>Incident Overview</h2>
      </div>
      <p>A threat actor going by <strong>Spirigatito</strong> has posted a leak of <strong>LCBO</strong> (Liquor Control Board of Ontario) on a public cybercrime forum, signing the post "Breached by @👑 Spirigatito" and addressing the forum community directly with the line "Today I am leaking LCBO database." LCBO is a Crown corporation owned by the Government of Ontario, established in 1927 following the end of provincial prohibition, and serves as the primary retail and wholesale channel for beverage alcohol in Canada's most populous province. With more than 670 retail stores plus a national e-commerce platform at lcbo.com, LCBO is one of the largest single buyers and retailers of alcohol in the world. The listing describes the victim as "the official e-commerce and information platform for the Liquor Control Board of Ontario."</p>
      <p>According to the listing, the breach affects <strong>165,840 customers</strong>, with the seller stating that each record contains the following six fields: Account ID, First Name, Last Name, Email, Phone, and Account Type. The published JSON sample confirms this schema and reveals the following data categories:</p>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Account Identifiers</strong>UUID-format accountId values that map each customer record to LCBO's internal account system, plus a "Customer" accountType label confirming these are retail consumer accounts rather than corporate or licensee accounts.</li>
        <li><strong>Full Names</strong>First and last names in plain text, with capitalisation inconsistencies suggesting raw user input rather than normalised fields.</li>
        <li><strong>Email Addresses</strong>Personal email addresses across major Canadian webmail providers.</li>
        <li><strong>Phone Numbers</strong>10-digit North American phone numbers, with the area-code distribution consistent with Ontario coverage.</li>
      </ul>
      <p>While the dataset is narrower than a financial breach (no payment card data, addresses, or order histories visible in the sample), the combination of <strong>name, email, and phone number tied to a verified LCBO customer account</strong> is highly weaponisable on its own. The data immediately enables targeted phishing campaigns referencing real LCBO branding, fraudulent loyalty-points or refund scams, and SIM-swap attempts using the phone numbers as starting points. </p>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">03</span>
        <h2>Compromised Data Categories</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-tags">
        <span class="dwi-tag">Account UUIDs</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">First Names</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Last Names</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Email Addresses</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Phone Numbers</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Account Type</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Ontario Customer Records</span>
      </div>
    </section>


        <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">04</span>
        <h2>Screenshots</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-shots">
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/9283759827346879256982569872365987235.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/9283759827346879256982569872365987235.png" alt="LCBO (Liquor Control Board of Ontario) Database Breached: 165,840 Customer Records Exposed from Ontario's Crown Corporation">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 01</span> · Forum listing header by Spirigatito with LCBO branding and 165,840 customer claim</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/9283759827346879256982569872365987236.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/9283759827346879256982569872365987236.png" alt="LCBO (Liquor Control Board of Ontario) Database Breached: 165,840 Customer Records Exposed from Ontario's Crown Corporation">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 02</span> · Sample records published by the actor (redacted in viewer)</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

  </div>
</article>
<!--kg-card-end: html-->

item.title: Den kulturelle skolesekken (DKS) Database Breached: 1,389,534 Records Exposed from Norway's National Cultural-Schoolbag Programme

<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;600&family=Source+Serif+4:opsz,wght@8..60,400;8..60,600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" crossorigin="anonymous" referrerpolicy="no-referrer">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css" integrity="sha512-DTOQO9RWCH3ppGqcWaEA1BIZOC6xxalwEsw9c2QQeAIftl+Vegovlnee1c9QX4TctnWMn13TZye+giMm8e2LwA==" crossorigin="anonymous" referrerpolicy="no-referrer">

<style>

.dwi-report{
  --dwir-card:#ffffff;
  --dwir-surface:#f7f8fa;
  --dwir-surface-2:#eef0f4;
  --dwir-surface-3:#e3e6ec;
  --dwir-border:#e4e7ed;
  --dwir-border-bright:#d2d7df;
  --dwir-text:#0f1419;
  --dwir-text-soft:#384152;
  --dwir-text-mute:#5b6573;
  --dwir-text-faint:#8a93a3;
  --dwir-brand:#1d6fe0;
  --dwir-brand-dim:#1558b5;
  --dwir-brand-soft:rgba(29,111,224,0.08);
  --dwir-brand-border:rgba(29,111,224,0.2);
  --dwir-critical:#c8312c;
  --dwir-critical-soft:rgba(200,49,44,0.07);
  --dwir-critical-border:rgba(200,49,44,0.22);
  --dwir-score-1:#1a3a6b;
  --dwir-score-2:#2956a3;
  --dwir-score-3:#3672d1;
  --dwir-score-4:#1d6fe0;
  --dwir-score-5:#0d5bc2;
  --dwir-score-accent-soft:rgba(29,111,224,0.08);
  --dwir-warn:#b86e14;
  --dwir-warn-soft:rgba(184,110,20,0.08);
  --dwir-warn-border:rgba(184,110,20,0.25);
  --dwir-success:#2f8040;
  --dwir-success-soft:rgba(47,128,64,0.07);
  --dwir-success-border:rgba(47,128,64,0.22);
  --dwir-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,20,25,0.06),0 6px 24px rgba(15,20,25,0.08);
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark){
  .dwi-report:not([data-dwir-theme="light"]){
    --dwir-card:#10131a;
    --dwir-surface:#161a22;
    --dwir-surface-2:#1d222c;
    --dwir-surface-3:#252b37;
    --dwir-border:#252a33;
    --dwir-border-bright:#343b48;
    --dwir-text:#e6e9ef;
    --dwir-text-soft:#b8bdc7;
    --dwir-text-mute:#8089a0;
    --dwir-text-faint:#5a6378;
    --dwir-brand:#4d9eff;
    --dwir-brand-dim:#3a7dd1;
    --dwir-brand-soft:rgba(77,158,255,0.09);
    --dwir-brand-border:rgba(77,158,255,0.22);
    --dwir-critical:#e5484d;
    --dwir-critical-soft:rgba(229,72,77,0.1);
    --dwir-critical-border:rgba(229,72,77,0.28);
    --dwir-warn:#f2a535;
    --dwir-warn-soft:rgba(242,165,53,0.1);
    --dwir-warn-border:rgba(242,165,53,0.3);
    --dwir-success:#46a758;
    --dwir-success-soft:rgba(70,167,88,0.1);
    --dwir-success-border:rgba(70,167,88,0.28);
    --dwir-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.25),0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  }
}

.dwi-report[data-dwir-theme="dark"]{
  --dwir-card:#10131a;
  --dwir-surface:#161a22;
  --dwir-surface-2:#1d222c;
  --dwir-surface-3:#252b37;
  --dwir-border:#252a33;
  --dwir-border-bright:#343b48;
  --dwir-text:#e6e9ef;
  --dwir-text-soft:#b8bdc7;
  --dwir-text-mute:#8089a0;
  --dwir-text-faint:#5a6378;
  --dwir-brand:#4d9eff;
  --dwir-brand-dim:#3a7dd1;
  --dwir-brand-soft:rgba(77,158,255,0.09);
  --dwir-brand-border:rgba(77,158,255,0.22);
  --dwir-critical:#e5484d;
  --dwir-critical-soft:rgba(229,72,77,0.1);
  --dwir-critical-border:rgba(229,72,77,0.28);
  --dwir-score-1:#2c4770;
  --dwir-score-2:#3b67a8;
  --dwir-score-3:#4a8ae0;
  --dwir-score-4:#5ca9ff;
  --dwir-score-5:#7dc4ff;
  --dwir-score-accent-soft:rgba(92,169,255,0.1);
  --dwir-warn:#f2a535;
  --dwir-warn-soft:rgba(242,165,53,0.1);
  --dwir-warn-border:rgba(242,165,53,0.3);
  --dwir-success:#46a758;
  --dwir-success-soft:rgba(70,167,88,0.1);
  --dwir-success-border:rgba(70,167,88,0.28);
  --dwir-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.25),0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
}

.dwi-report{
  font-family:'Inter',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;
  max-width:920px;
  margin:32px auto;
  background:var(--dwir-card);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:12px;
  box-shadow:var(--dwir-shadow);
  overflow:hidden;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  line-height:1.6;
  font-feature-settings:"kern","ss01","cv11";
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
  transition:background-color .2s ease,border-color .2s ease;
}
.dwi-report *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}

.dwi-topbar{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  padding:10px 32px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  letter-spacing:0.02em;
}
.dwi-topbar-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;color:var(--dwir-text-soft)}
.dwi-topbar-status::before{
  content:'';
  width:6px;height:6px;
  background:var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:50%;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--dwir-critical-soft);
}
.dwi-topbar-right{color:var(--dwir-text-faint)}

.dwi-header{padding:48px 40px 36px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border)}
.dwi-breadcrumb{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  margin-bottom:28px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.dwi-breadcrumb a{color:var(--dwir-text-mute);text-decoration:none;transition:color .15s}
.dwi-breadcrumb a:hover{color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-breadcrumb i{font-size:9px;color:var(--dwir-text-faint)}
.dwi-breadcrumb .current{color:var(--dwir-text-soft)}

.dwi-report-label{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:10px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  letter-spacing:0.15em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:6px 12px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-brand-border);
  border-radius:4px;
  margin-bottom:24px;
}

.dwi-title{
  font-size:clamp(26px,3.5vw,36px);
  font-weight:700;
  line-height:1.2;
  letter-spacing:-0.02em;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  margin-bottom:20px;
  max-width:780px;
}

.dwi-summary{
  font-family:'Source Serif 4',Georgia,serif;
  font-size:18px;
  line-height:1.6;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  max-width:720px;
  margin-bottom:32px;
  font-weight:400;
}
.dwi-summary strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}

.dwi-meta{
  display:flex;
  gap:28px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  padding-top:24px;
  border-top:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-meta-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
.dwi-meta-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:10px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text-faint);
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
}
.dwi-meta-value{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--dwir-text)}

.dwi-content{padding:40px}

.dwi-severity{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-left:3px solid var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:6px;
  padding:20px 24px;
  margin-bottom:36px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:20px;
}
.dwi-severity-icon{
  width:40px;height:40px;
  flex-shrink:0;
  background:var(--dwir-critical-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-critical-border);
  border-radius:8px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:var(--dwir-critical);
  font-size:16px;
}
.dwi-severity-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-critical);
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:4px;
}
.dwi-severity-text{font-size:14px;color:var(--dwir-text-soft);line-height:1.5}
.dwi-severity-text strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}

.dwi-api-promo{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  padding:18px 22px;
  margin-bottom:28px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:20px;
  transition:border-color .15s;
}
.dwi-api-promo:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-api-promo-content{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px}
.dwi-api-promo-icon{
  width:36px;height:36px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-brand-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  font-size:14px;
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.dwi-api-promo-text{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px}
.dwi-api-promo-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dwir-text)}
.dwi-api-promo-description{font-size:13px;color:var(--dwir-text-mute);line-height:1.5}

.dwi-btn{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  padding:9px 16px;
  font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:500;
  text-decoration:none;
  border-radius:6px;
  border:1px solid;
  transition:all .15s ease;
  white-space:nowrap;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.dwi-btn-primary{background:var(--dwir-brand);color:#fff;border-color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-btn-primary:hover{background:var(--dwir-brand-dim);border-color:var(--dwir-brand-dim);color:#fff}
.dwi-btn-secondary{background:transparent;color:var(--dwir-text);border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-btn-secondary:hover{background:var(--dwir-surface-2);border-color:var(--dwir-text-faint);color:var(--dwir-text)}
.dwi-btn-warn{background:transparent;color:var(--dwir-warn);border-color:var(--dwir-warn-border)}
.dwi-btn-warn:hover{background:var(--dwir-warn-soft);border-color:var(--dwir-warn);color:var(--dwir-warn)}

.dwi-promo-card{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--dwir-brand-soft) 0%,transparent 60%),var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:8px;
  padding:32px;
  margin-bottom:44px;
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-promo-card::before{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--dwir-brand),transparent);
}
.dwi-promo-badge{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}
.dwi-promo-badge i{font-size:10px}
.dwi-promo-title{
  font-size:22px;
  font-weight:700;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  margin-bottom:10px;
  letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  line-height:1.3;
}
.dwi-promo-description{
  font-size:15px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  margin-bottom:22px;
  line-height:1.6;
  max-width:640px;
}

.dwi-section{margin-bottom:44px}
.dwi-section-header{
  display:flex;
  align-items:baseline;
  gap:14px;
  margin-bottom:20px;
  padding-bottom:12px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-section-number{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-faint);
  font-weight:500;
  letter-spacing:0.05em;
}
.dwi-section-header h2{
  font-size:20px;
  font-weight:700;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  margin:0;
}

.dwi-facts{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:1px;
  background:var(--dwir-border);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-fact-row{
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
  padding:12px 16px;
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  gap:12px;
  transition:background .15s;
}
.dwi-fact-row:hover{background:var(--dwir-surface-2)}
.dwi-fact-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.08em;
}
.dwi-fact-value{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  text-align:right;
}
.dwi-fact-value.accent{color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-fact-value.warn{color:var(--dwir-warn)}
.dwi-fact-value.critical{color:var(--dwir-critical)}
.dwi-flag{
  display:inline-block;
  width:20px;
  height:10px;
  margin-right:6px;
  vertical-align:-1px;
  border-radius:2px;
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  box-sizing:content-box;
}

.dwi-prose p{
  font-size:15.5px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  line-height:1.75;
  margin-bottom:18px;
}
.dwi-prose p strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}
.dwi-prose ul{
  list-style:none;
  padding:0;
  margin:20px 0;
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-prose ul li{
  position:relative;
  padding:14px 20px 14px 48px;
  font-size:14.5px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  line-height:1.6;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-prose ul li:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.dwi-prose ul li::before{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  left:20px;top:21px;
  width:14px;height:14px;
  border:1.5px solid var(--dwir-brand);
  border-radius:3px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
}
.dwi-prose ul li::after{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  left:25px;top:25px;
  width:4px;height:7px;
  border-right:1.5px solid var(--dwir-brand);
  border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--dwir-brand);
  transform:rotate(45deg);
}
.dwi-prose ul li strong{
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  font-weight:600;
  display:block;
  margin-bottom:3px;
  font-size:13px;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.05em;
}

.dwi-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
.dwi-tag{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  padding:7px 12px;
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:4px;
  transition:all .15s;
}
.dwi-tag:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-critical);background:var(--dwir-critical-soft)}
.dwi-tag::before{
  content:'';
  width:5px;height:5px;
  background:var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:50%;
}

.dwi-shots{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:16px}
.dwi-shot{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .15s;
}
.dwi-shot:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-shot a{display:block;position:relative;text-decoration:none}
.dwi-shot img{width:100%;display:block}
.dwi-shot-caption{
  padding:12px 16px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  border-top:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
}
.dwi-shot-caption .fig{color:var(--dwir-brand);font-weight:600}

@media(max-width:768px){
  .dwi-report{margin:16px;border-radius:10px}
  .dwi-topbar{padding:10px 20px;font-size:10px}
  .dwi-topbar-right{display:none}
  .dwi-header{padding:32px 24px 28px}
  .dwi-content{padding:28px 24px}
  .dwi-title{font-size:24px}
  .dwi-summary{font-size:16px}
  .dwi-meta{gap:18px}
  .dwi-facts{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .dwi-api-promo,.dwi-severity{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}
  .dwi-severity{align-items:flex-start}
  .dwi-btn{width:100%;justify-content:center}
  .dwi-promo-card{padding:24px}
  .dwi-promo-title{font-size:18px}
}
</style>

<article class="dwi-report">

  <div class="dwi-topbar">
    <span class="dwi-topbar-status">Active Threat</span>
    <span class="dwi-topbar-right">Report ID: DWI-2026-0427-02</span>
  </div>

  <header class="dwi-header">
    <div class="dwi-report-label">
      <i class="fas fa-file-shield" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      Threat Intelligence Report
    </div>

    <h1 class="dwi-title">Den kulturelle skolesekken (DKS) Database Breached: 1,389,534 Records Exposed from Norway's National Cultural-Schoolbag Programme</h1>

    <img src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/27835699872635987263549872469874238.png" alt="Den kulturelle skolesekken (DKS) Database Breached: 1,389,534 Records Exposed from Norway's National Cultural-Schoolbag Programme"><p class="dwi-summary">A threat actor operating under the alias <strong>Spirigatito</strong> has released the database of <strong>Den kulturelle skolesekken</strong> (DKS, "The Cultural Schoolbag"), a national Norwegian government programme run by the Ministry of Culture agency <strong>Kulturtanken</strong> that delivers professional arts and culture experiences to every school pupil in Norway. The listing claims three breaches with <strong>1,389,534 rows</strong> in total, including PII, internal county-council communications, and full programme planning records.</p>

    <div class="dwi-meta">
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Published</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value"><time datetime="2026-04-27T17:34:30Z">Apr 27, 2026 · 17:34 UTC</time></span>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Origin</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value">Norway</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Sector</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value">Government / Culture & Education</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Read Time</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value">7 min</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <div class="dwi-content">

    
    <div class="dwi-severity" role="region" aria-label="Severity assessment">
      <div class="dwi-severity-icon" aria-hidden="true">
        <i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="dwi-severity-label">Critical Severity</div>
        <p class="dwi-severity-text">A breach of <strong>Norway's national cultural-schoolbag programme</strong> serving every school pupil in the country, with <strong>1,389,534 rows</strong> spanning PII, internal county-council messages, and programme planning data. High risk of targeted social engineering against Norwegian government employees, performers, and school administrators across every fylkeskommune.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    
    <aside class="dwi-api-promo api-promo">
      <div class="dwi-api-promo-content">
        <div class="dwi-api-promo-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="fas fa-code"></i></div>
        <div class="dwi-api-promo-text">
          <span class="dwi-api-promo-title">API Access Available</span>
          <span class="dwi-api-promo-description">Threat intelligence endpoints, ransomware feeds, and IOC data for programmatic integration.</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <a href="https://darkwebinformer.com/api-details/" class="dwi-btn dwi-btn-secondary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">View Details <i class="fas fa-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></i></a>
    </aside>

    
    <aside class="dwi-promo-card promo-card">
      <div class="dwi-promo-badge">
        <i class="fas fa-shield-halved" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        Premium Intelligence
      </div>
      <h2 class="dwi-promo-title">Real-time breach tracking, primary-source evidence, and expert analysis.</h2>
      <p class="dwi-promo-description">Built for security professionals, researchers, and journalists. Unlock the complete threat feed, ransomware feed, and original claim URLs.</p>
      <a href="https://darkwebinformer.com/pricing" class="dwi-btn dwi-btn-primary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Subscribe <i class="fas fa-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></i></a>
    </aside>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">01</span>
        <h2>Incident Summary</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-facts">
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Date & Time</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">2026-04-27 17:34 UTC</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Threat Actor</span><span class="dwi-fact-value warn">Spirigatito</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Victim</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Den kulturelle skolesekken (DKS)</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Operator</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Kulturtanken</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Industry</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Government / Culture & Education</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Category</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Data Breach</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Total Rows</span><span class="dwi-fact-value critical">1,389,534</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Datasets</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">3 separate breaches</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Distribution</span><span class="dwi-fact-value critical">4 forum points</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Network</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Open Web</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Country</span><span class="dwi-fact-value"><svg class="dwi-flag" viewbox="0 0 22 16" aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" preserveaspectratio="none"><rect width="22" height="16" fill="#EF2B2D"/><rect x="6" y="0" width="2" height="16" fill="#ffffff"/><rect x="0" y="7" width="22" height="2" fill="#ffffff"/><rect x="6.5" y="0" width="1" height="16" fill="#002868"/><rect x="0" y="7.5" width="22" height="1" fill="#002868"/></svg> Norway</span></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section dwi-prose">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">02</span>
        <h2>Incident Overview</h2>
      </div>
      <p>A threat actor going by <strong>Spirigatito</strong> has posted a leak of <strong>Den kulturelle skolesekken</strong> (DKS, "The Cultural Schoolbag") on a public cybercrime forum, signing the post "Breached by @👑 Spirigatito" and addressing the forum community directly with the line "Today I am leaking DenKulturelles database." DKS is one of the largest national cultural-policy programmes in the world, established in 2001 and operated by the Ministry of Culture agency <strong>Kulturtanken</strong> (Arts for Young Audiences Norway) since 2016. The programme delivers professional film, literature, music, performing arts, visual arts, and cultural-heritage experiences to <strong>every school pupil in Norway</strong> from first grade through year 3 of upper secondary, in cooperation with all county councils (fylkeskommune) and municipalities (kommune).</p>
      <p>According to the listing, three breaches affect <strong>1,389,534 rows in total</strong>, distributed across three structurally distinct datasets. Each is represented by a JSON sample in the forum post. The data categories exposed include:</p>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>User & Performer Records</strong>Approximately one million rows containing id, is_performer flag, performer_branch_office_ids, first_name, last_name, email, phone_number_formatted, address (postal_code, locality, street), nationality (NO, SE), and language code (nb for Norwegian Bokmål). Visible sample emails span Norwegian county-council domains including telemarkfylke.no, vtfk.no (Vestfold Telemark), and bergen.kommune.no, alongside private addresses on hotmail.com and monlyse.org.</li>
        <li><strong>Internal Communications</strong>Full message bodies between DKS coordinators and county-level cultural officers, with sender_user_name, sender_name (e.g. "Agder fylkeskommune", "Vestland fylkeskommune", "Nordland fylkeskommune", "Oslo kommune", "Kristiansand kommune"), recipients_stringified, subject lines, content_text, topic_id, related_entity_ids, branch_office_id, and Unix time_sent_int timestamps from 2023.</li>
        <li><strong>Programme & Tour Planning</strong>Records for individual cultural productions including cultural_institution_name (e.g. Vestfoldmuseene, Vikinggården på Borre), production names (Vitsen med GRENSER, VGS-bestilling 26/27, Mia har forlatt chatten), branch_office_id, performer_count, tour_staff_count, budget_total / budget_tour / budget_development, year_level_minimum / year_level_maximum (school grades), program_seasons (e.g. "Høst 2026, Vår 2027"), location_type, and is_published / is_deleted flags.</li>
        <li><strong>Tour Logistics & Travel Quotes</strong>Fragments of internal correspondence visible in the sample reference detailed travel logistics including flight quotes (Bergen to Sandefjord, kr 2480 and kr 3079) and tour scheduling for cultural productions across multiple Norwegian counties.</li>
      </ul>
      <p>The sample data is internally coherent: phone numbers carry the Norwegian +47 country code, addresses include real postal codes for Skien (3736), Bø i Telemark (3801), Porsgrunn (3912), and other Norwegian locations, and the references to fylkeskommune and kommune entities map to the actual administrative divisions of Norway. The intermingling of <strong>government employee PII, private citizen contact details, and rich internal communications</strong> makes this a high-impact incident for Kulturtanken specifically and for any of the eleven Norwegian county councils whose DKS coordinators appear in the dataset. </p>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">03</span>
        <h2>Compromised Data Categories</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-tags">
        <span class="dwi-tag">Full Names</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Email Addresses</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Phone Numbers (+47)</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Postal Addresses</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Nationality</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Performer Records</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Internal Messages</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Sender / Recipient Mapping</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Programme Names</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Cultural Institution IDs</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Tour Schedules</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Budget Figures</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">School Year Targeting</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Branch Office IDs</span>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">04</span>
        <h2>Screenshots</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-shots">
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/27835699872635987263549872469874235.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/27835699872635987263549872469874235.png" alt="Den kulturelle skolesekken (DKS) Database Breached: 1,389,534 Records Exposed from Norway's National Cultural-Schoolbag Programme">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 01</span> · Forum listing header by Spirigatito with DKS branding</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/27835699872635987263549872469874236.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/27835699872635987263549872469874236.png" alt="Den kulturelle skolesekken (DKS) Database Breached: 1,389,534 Records Exposed from Norway's National Cultural-Schoolbag Programme">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 02</span> · User PII samples with vtfk.no/telemarkfylke.no domains and county-council messages</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/27835699872635987263549872469874237.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/27835699872635987263549872469874237.png" alt="Den kulturelle skolesekken (DKS) Database Breached: 1,389,534 Records Exposed from Norway's National Cultural-Schoolbag Programme">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 03</span> · Programme planning records with cultural institutions, budgets, and 2026/2027 seasons</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

  </div>
</article>
<!--kg-card-end: html-->

item.title: Arkansas State Crime Lab Database Breached: Threat Actor kittykatkrew Leaks Court Calendars and Law Enforcement Personnel Directory
item.description: Arkansas State Crime Lab Database Breached: Threat Actor kittykatkrew Leaks Court Calendars and Law Enforcement Personnel Directory
item.dc:creator: Dark Web Informer
item.content:encoded:
<!--kg-card-begin: html-->
<meta name="description" content="Threat actor kittykatkrew has leaked the database of the Arkansas State Crime Laboratory (crimelab.arkansas.gov), exposing court calendars with defendant and analyst data alongside a full law enforcement personnel directory.">

  max-width:920px;

    <h1 class="dwi-title">Arkansas State Crime Lab Database Breached: Threat Actor kittykatkrew Leaks Court Calendars and Law Enforcement Personnel Directory</h1>

    <img src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/978235698723659872364987235698234968734.png" alt="Arkansas State Crime Lab Database Breached: Threat Actor kittykatkrew Leaks Court Calendars and Law Enforcement Personnel Directory"><p class="dwi-summary">A threat actor operating under the alias <strong>kittykatkrew</strong> has released a database attributed to the <strong>Arkansas State Crime Laboratory</strong> (crimelab.arkansas.gov), the forensic science agency operating under the Arkansas Department of Public Safety. The listing claims the compromise was carried out via the agency's web portal at <strong>lasso.crimelab.arkansas.gov</strong> and publishes a download link containing two datasets: a complete court calendar with active case details and a full personnel directory of law enforcement and municipal officials with portal access.</p>

    <div class="dwi-meta">
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Published</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value"><time datetime="2026-04-23T19:02:51Z">Apr 23, 2026 · 19:02 UTC</time></span>

  <div class="dwi-content">

        <p class="dwi-severity-text">A breach of a <strong>US state forensic science agency</strong>, exposing active criminal case calendars (defendants, court dates, forensic analyst assignments) and a personnel directory of prosecutors, police, and city officials with portal credentials. High risk of case tampering, witness intimidation, and targeted social engineering against law enforcement personnel.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">01</span>
        <h2>Incident Summary</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-facts">
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Date & Time</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">2026-04-23 19:02 UTC</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Threat Actor</span><span class="dwi-fact-value warn">kittykatkrew</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Victim</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Arkansas State Crime Lab</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Domain</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">crimelab.arkansas.gov</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Industry</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Government / Law Enforcement</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Category</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Data Breach</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Entry Point</span><span class="dwi-fact-value critical">lasso.crimelab.arkansas.gov</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Scope</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Court Calendar + Personnel</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Record Count</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Undisclosed</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Distribution</span><span class="dwi-fact-value critical">Free Download</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">File Host</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">biteblob.com</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Archive Format</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">.rar</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Forum</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">spear.cx</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Network</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Open Web</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">State</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Arkansas</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Country</span><span class="dwi-fact-value"><svg class="dwi-flag" viewbox="0 0 60 32" aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" preserveaspectratio="none"><rect width="60" height="32" fill="#ffffff"/><rect width="60" height="2.46" y="0" fill="#B22234"/><rect width="60" height="2.46" y="4.92" fill="#B22234"/><rect width="60" height="2.46" y="9.85" fill="#B22234"/><rect width="60" height="2.46" y="14.77" fill="#B22234"/><rect width="60" height="2.46" y="19.69" fill="#B22234"/><rect width="60" height="2.46" y="24.62" fill="#B22234"/><rect width="60" height="2.46" y="29.54" fill="#B22234"/><rect width="24" height="17.23" fill="#3C3B6E"/></svg> United States</span></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section dwi-prose">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">02</span>
        <h2>Incident Overview</h2>
      </div>
      <p>A threat actor going by <strong>kittykatkrew</strong> has posted a breach of the <strong>Arkansas State Crime Laboratory</strong> on the cybercrime forum <strong>spear.cx</strong>. The Arkansas State Crime Lab is the state's primary forensic science agency, established in 1977 and placed under the Arkansas Department of Public Safety in 2019, with a main facility in Little Rock and regional laboratories in Lowell and Hope. The agency provides forensic pathology, toxicology, DNA, firearms, latent fingerprint, drug analysis, and digital evidence services to all state and federal law enforcement agencies operating in Arkansas, and is staffed by roughly 144 personnel. According to the listing, the compromise was achieved through the agency's public-facing web portal at <strong>lasso.crimelab.arkansas.gov</strong>.</p>
      <p>The actor states that two distinct datasets were exfiltrated, and each is represented by a sample in the forum post. The data categories exposed include:</p>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Complete Court Calendar</strong>Case details (case numbers in 42BCR-25-61-style format, internal tracking IDs), defendant names, court dates, courtroom numbers, forensic analyst assignments, approval status, and prosecutor contact information.</li>
        <li><strong>Full Personnel Directory</strong>Names, email addresses, phone numbers, job titles, and employing agencies for every portal user.</li>
        <li><strong>Account Status Metadata</strong>Administrative flags indicating which accounts are approved, rejected, or locked out, along with the most recent login timestamps for each user, which would allow an attacker to identify active versus dormant credentials.</li>
        <li><strong>Agency Mapping</strong>The "agency" field in the personnel directory enumerates the full roster of Arkansas municipal, county, and state law enforcement and prosecutorial offices that hold LASSO portal access, producing a de facto map of the state's criminal justice IT footprint.</li>
      </ul>
      <p>The exposure of active court-calendar data is the most severe element of this leak. Unlike a consumer PII breach, the dataset effectively publishes a <strong>schedule of upcoming criminal proceedings with the names of defendants, prosecutors, and the specific forensic analysts assigned to each case</strong>, creating tangible risks of witness or analyst intimidation, evidence or case tampering, and targeted social engineering in the window before a given court date. The personnel directory compounds the risk by providing verified contact paths (work emails, direct phone numbers, and authorised-user status) for prosecutors, police officials, and city attorneys across Arkansas, which is an ideal starting point for business-email-compromise, fake subpoena, or impersonation attacks.</p>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">03</span>
        <h2>Compromised Data Categories</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-tags">
        <span class="dwi-tag">Active Case Numbers</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Defendant Names</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Court Dates</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Courtroom Numbers</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Forensic Analyst Assignments</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Prosecutor Names & Emails</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Law Enforcement Directory</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Work Email Addresses</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Direct Phone Numbers</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Job Titles</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Employing Agencies</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Account Status Flags</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Last Login Timestamps</span>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">04</span>
        <h2>Screenshots</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-shots">
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/978235698723659872364987235698234968732.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/978235698723659872364987235698234968732.png" alt="Arkansas State Crime Lab Database Breached: Threat Actor kittykatkrew Leaks Court Calendars and Law Enforcement Personnel Directory">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 01</span> · spear.cx listing by kittykatkrew with court calendar sample</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/978235698723659872364987235698234968733.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/978235698723659872364987235698234968733.png" alt="Arkansas State Crime Lab Database Breached: Threat Actor kittykatkrew Leaks Court Calendars and Law Enforcement Personnel Directory">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 02</span> · Personnel directory JSON sample and biteblob.com download URL</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

  </div>
</article>
<!--kg-card-end: html-->

item.title: Ledil Immobilier (ledil.immo) Database Breached: Threat Actor 888 Leaks 6,700 French Real Estate User Records
