.dwi-report{
  font-family:'Inter',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;
  max-width:920px;
  margin:32px auto;
  background:var(--dwir-card);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:12px;
  box-shadow:var(--dwir-shadow);
  overflow:hidden;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  line-height:1.6;
  font-feature-settings:"kern","ss01","cv11";
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
  transition:background-color .2s ease,border-color .2s ease;
}
.dwi-report *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}

.dwi-topbar{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  padding:10px 32px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  letter-spacing:0.02em;
}
.dwi-topbar-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;color:var(--dwir-text-soft)}
.dwi-topbar-status::before{
  content:'';
  width:6px;height:6px;
  background:var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:50%;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--dwir-critical-soft);
}
.dwi-topbar-right{color:var(--dwir-text-faint)}

.dwi-header{padding:48px 40px 36px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border)}
.dwi-breadcrumb{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  margin-bottom:28px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.dwi-breadcrumb a{color:var(--dwir-text-mute);text-decoration:none;transition:color .15s}
.dwi-breadcrumb a:hover{color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-breadcrumb i{font-size:9px;color:var(--dwir-text-faint)}
.dwi-breadcrumb .current{color:var(--dwir-text-soft)}

.dwi-report-label{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:10px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  letter-spacing:0.15em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:6px 12px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-brand-border);
  border-radius:4px;
  margin-bottom:24px;
}

.dwi-title{
  font-size:clamp(26px,3.5vw,36px);
  font-weight:700;
  line-height:1.2;
  letter-spacing:-0.02em;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  margin-bottom:20px;
  max-width:780px;
}

.dwi-summary{
  font-family:'Source Serif 4',Georgia,serif;
  font-size:18px;
  line-height:1.6;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  max-width:720px;
  margin-bottom:32px;
  font-weight:400;
}
.dwi-summary strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}

.dwi-meta{
  display:flex;
  gap:28px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  padding-top:24px;
  border-top:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-meta-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
.dwi-meta-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:10px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text-faint);
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
}
.dwi-meta-value{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--dwir-text)}

.dwi-content{padding:40px}

.dwi-severity{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-left:3px solid var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:6px;
  padding:20px 24px;
  margin-bottom:36px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:20px;
}
.dwi-severity-icon{
  width:40px;height:40px;
  flex-shrink:0;
  background:var(--dwir-critical-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-critical-border);
  border-radius:8px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:var(--dwir-critical);
  font-size:16px;
}
.dwi-severity-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-critical);
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:4px;
}
.dwi-severity-text{font-size:14px;color:var(--dwir-text-soft);line-height:1.5}
.dwi-severity-text strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}

.dwi-api-promo{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  padding:18px 22px;
  margin-bottom:28px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:20px;
  transition:border-color .15s;
}
.dwi-api-promo:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-api-promo-content{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px}
.dwi-api-promo-icon{
  width:36px;height:36px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-brand-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  font-size:14px;
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.dwi-api-promo-text{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px}
.dwi-api-promo-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dwir-text)}
.dwi-api-promo-description{font-size:13px;color:var(--dwir-text-mute);line-height:1.5}

.dwi-btn{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  padding:9px 16px;
  font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:500;
  text-decoration:none;
  border-radius:6px;
  border:1px solid;
  transition:all .15s ease;
  white-space:nowrap;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.dwi-btn-primary{background:var(--dwir-brand);color:#fff;border-color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-btn-primary:hover{background:var(--dwir-brand-dim);border-color:var(--dwir-brand-dim);color:#fff}
.dwi-btn-secondary{background:transparent;color:var(--dwir-text);border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-btn-secondary:hover{background:var(--dwir-surface-2);border-color:var(--dwir-text-faint);color:var(--dwir-text)}
.dwi-btn-warn{background:transparent;color:var(--dwir-warn);border-color:var(--dwir-warn-border)}
.dwi-btn-warn:hover{background:var(--dwir-warn-soft);border-color:var(--dwir-warn);color:var(--dwir-warn)}

.dwi-promo-card{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--dwir-brand-soft) 0%,transparent 60%),var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:8px;
  padding:32px;
  margin-bottom:44px;
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-promo-card::before{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--dwir-brand),transparent);
}
.dwi-promo-badge{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}
.dwi-promo-badge i{font-size:10px}
.dwi-promo-title{
  font-size:22px;
  font-weight:700;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  margin-bottom:10px;
  letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  line-height:1.3;
}
.dwi-promo-description{
  font-size:15px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  margin-bottom:22px;
  line-height:1.6;
  max-width:640px;
}

.dwi-section{margin-bottom:44px}
.dwi-section-header{
  display:flex;
  align-items:baseline;
  gap:14px;
  margin-bottom:20px;
  padding-bottom:12px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-section-number{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-faint);
  font-weight:500;
  letter-spacing:0.05em;
}
.dwi-section-header h2{
  font-size:20px;
  font-weight:700;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  margin:0;
}

.dwi-facts{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:1px;
  background:var(--dwir-border);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-fact-row{
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
  padding:12px 16px;
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  gap:12px;
  transition:background .15s;
}
.dwi-fact-row:hover{background:var(--dwir-surface-2)}
.dwi-fact-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.08em;
}
.dwi-fact-value{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  text-align:right;
}
.dwi-fact-value.accent{color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-fact-value.warn{color:var(--dwir-warn)}
.dwi-fact-value.critical{color:var(--dwir-critical)}
.dwi-flag{
  display:inline-block;
  width:20px;
  height:10px;
  margin-right:6px;
  vertical-align:-1px;
  border-radius:2px;
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  box-sizing:content-box;
}

.dwi-prose p{
  font-size:15.5px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  line-height:1.75;
  margin-bottom:18px;
}
.dwi-prose p strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}
.dwi-prose ul{
  list-style:none;
  padding:0;
  margin:20px 0;
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-prose ul li{
  position:relative;
  padding:14px 20px 14px 48px;
  font-size:14.5px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  line-height:1.6;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-prose ul li:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.dwi-prose ul li::before{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  left:20px;top:21px;
  width:14px;height:14px;
  border:1.5px solid var(--dwir-brand);
  border-radius:3px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
}
.dwi-prose ul li::after{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  left:25px;top:25px;
  width:4px;height:7px;
  border-right:1.5px solid var(--dwir-brand);
  border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--dwir-brand);
  transform:rotate(45deg);
}
.dwi-prose ul li strong{
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  font-weight:600;
  display:block;
  margin-bottom:3px;
  font-size:13px;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.05em;
}

.dwi-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
.dwi-tag{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  padding:7px 12px;
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:4px;
  transition:all .15s;
}
.dwi-tag:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-critical);background:var(--dwir-critical-soft)}
.dwi-tag::before{
  content:'';
  width:5px;height:5px;
  background:var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:50%;
}

.dwi-shots{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:16px}
.dwi-shot{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .15s;
}
.dwi-shot:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-shot a{display:block;position:relative;text-decoration:none}
.dwi-shot img{width:100%;display:block}
.dwi-shot-caption{
  padding:12px 16px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  border-top:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
}
.dwi-shot-caption .fig{color:var(--dwir-brand);font-weight:600}

@media(max-width:768px){
  .dwi-report{margin:16px;border-radius:10px}
  .dwi-topbar{padding:10px 20px;font-size:10px}
  .dwi-topbar-right{display:none}
  .dwi-header{padding:32px 24px 28px}
  .dwi-content{padding:28px 24px}
  .dwi-title{font-size:24px}
  .dwi-summary{font-size:16px}
  .dwi-meta{gap:18px}
  .dwi-facts{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .dwi-api-promo,.dwi-severity{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}
  .dwi-severity{align-items:flex-start}
  .dwi-btn{width:100%;justify-content:center}
  .dwi-promo-card{padding:24px}
  .dwi-promo-title{font-size:18px}
}
</style>

<article class="dwi-report">

  <div class="dwi-topbar">
    <span class="dwi-topbar-status">Active Threat</span>
    <span class="dwi-topbar-right">Report ID: DWI-2026-0421-01</span>
  </div>

  <header class="dwi-header">
    <div class="dwi-report-label">
      <i class="fas fa-file-shield" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      Threat Intelligence Report
    </div>

    <h1 class="dwi-title">Ledil Immobilier (ledil.immo) Database Breached: Threat Actor 888 Leaks 6,700 French Real Estate User Records</h1>

    <img src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/348962348572359876235968792837654.png" alt="Ledil Immobilier (ledil.immo) Database Breached: Threat Actor 888 Leaks 6,700 French Real Estate User Records"><p class="dwi-summary">A threat actor operating under the alias <strong>888</strong> has released the complete database of <strong>Ledil Immobilier</strong> (ledil.immo), a French real estate mandataire network founded in Agen in 2012 with more than 2,000 listed properties. The listing on darkforums.su claims the breach occurred in April 2026 and exposes <strong>6,700 unique user records</strong> covering acquéreurs (buyers), mandataires (agents), notaires, and property intervenants. The archive is offered as a free download to registered forum members.</p>

    <div class="dwi-meta">
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Published</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value"><time datetime="2026-04-21T19:24:08Z">Apr 21, 2026 · 19:24 UTC</time></span>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Origin</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value">France</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Sector</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value">Real Estate / Mandataire Network</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Read Time</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value">6 min</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <div class="dwi-content">

    
    <div class="dwi-severity" role="region" aria-label="Severity assessment">
      <div class="dwi-severity-icon" aria-hidden="true">
        <i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="dwi-severity-label">Critical Severity</div>
        <p class="dwi-severity-text">A full database dump of a French real estate network with <strong>6,700 unique user records</strong>, including names, emails, phone numbers, addresses, property transaction data, and professional identifiers for notaires and mandataires. Distributed as a <strong>free download on darkforums.su</strong>, maximising exposure. High risk of targeted fraud against buyers, sellers, and agents.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    
    <aside class="dwi-api-promo api-promo">
      <div class="dwi-api-promo-content">
        <div class="dwi-api-promo-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="fas fa-code"></i></div>
        <div class="dwi-api-promo-text">
          <span class="dwi-api-promo-title">API Access Available</span>
          <span class="dwi-api-promo-description">Threat intelligence endpoints, ransomware feeds, and IOC data for programmatic integration.</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <a href="https://darkwebinformer.com/api-details/" class="dwi-btn dwi-btn-secondary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">View Details <i class="fas fa-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></i></a>
    </aside>

    
    <aside class="dwi-promo-card promo-card">
      <div class="dwi-promo-badge">
        <i class="fas fa-shield-halved" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        Premium Intelligence
      </div>
      <h2 class="dwi-promo-title">Real-time breach tracking, primary-source evidence, and expert analysis.</h2>
      <p class="dwi-promo-description">Built for security professionals, researchers, and journalists. Unlock the complete threat feed, ransomware feed, and original claim URLs.</p>
      <a href="https://darkwebinformer.com/pricing" class="dwi-btn dwi-btn-primary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Subscribe <i class="fas fa-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></i></a>
    </aside>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">01</span>
        <h2>Incident Summary</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-facts">
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Date & Time</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">2026-04-21 19:24 UTC</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Threat Actor</span><span class="dwi-fact-value warn">888</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Victim</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Ledil Immobilier (ledil.immo)</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Industry</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Real Estate / Mandataire</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Category</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Data Breach</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Unique Records</span><span class="dwi-fact-value critical">6,700</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Breach Date (claimed)</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">April 2026</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Scope</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Full Database</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Distribution</span><span class="dwi-fact-value critical">Free Download</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Access</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Forum Registration</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Platform</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Drupal (Search API)</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Forum</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">darkforums.su</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Network</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Open Web</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Country</span><span class="dwi-fact-value"><svg class="dwi-flag" viewbox="0 0 60 40" aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" preserveaspectratio="none"><rect width="20" height="40" x="0" fill="#002654"/><rect width="20" height="40" x="20" fill="#ffffff"/><rect width="20" height="40" x="40" fill="#ED2939"/></svg> France</span></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section dwi-prose">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">02</span>
        <h2>Incident Overview</h2>
      </div>
      <p>A threat actor going by <strong>888</strong> has posted the full database of <strong>Ledil Immobilier</strong> (ledil.immo) on a popular cybercrime forum. Ledil Immobilier is a French real estate mandataire network founded in 2012 by Katia and Laurent Baron in Agen (Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine) and operating nationally with more than 2,000 property listings across houses, apartments, land, and investments. The actor describes the company as "a pioneering network of free real estate agents" and states the breach occurred in <strong>April 2026</strong>.</p>
      <p>According to the listing, the dataset contains <strong>6,700 unique user records</strong>. The exposed schema visible in the compromised-data list and sample rows is consistent with a full export from Ledil's internal business tool, which appears to run on <strong>Drupal with the Search API</strong> (fields include search_api_solr, drupal_X2f_langcode, and entity:acquereur references). The data categories exposed include:</p>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Acquéreur (Buyer) Records</strong>Full names, email addresses, telephone numbers, addresses, nationalities, and search criteria tied to individual prospective buyers registered in Ledil's CRM.</li>
        <li><strong>Mandataire & Agent Data</strong>Agent user IDs, names, emails, and telephone numbers for Ledil's network of mandataires, along with sector assignments and postal codes of their working zones.</li>
        <li><strong>Notaire & Intervenant Details</strong>Identifiers for notaires and other transaction intervenants, with linkages to specific property files and mandates.</li>
        <li><strong>Property (Bien) Records</strong>Property prices, descriptions, locations (commune, département), surface areas, legal statuses, number of rooms, energy categories, commercial status, and offer-type metadata.</li>
        <li><strong>Transaction Metadata</strong>Honoraires (agent fees), mandate document numbers, boost and highlight flags, creation and update timestamps, message logs, and internal statuses for each listing.</li>
      </ul>
      <p>The sample rows published by the actor include real French email addresses across commonly-used domains (wanadoo.fr, hotmail.fr, and corporate addresses such as amann-kaffee.at), first names, and Drupal entity URLs pointing to <strong>enterprise1.ledil.immo</strong>, suggesting the leak originates from an internal staging or production instance of Ledil's mandataire platform rather than from a public website. Transaction timestamps in the visible sample cluster around late 2025, consistent with the claimed April 2026 breach date. The fact that the dataset is being distributed <strong>at no cost</strong>, only gated behind basic forum registration, maximises exposure and makes retroactive containment impractical. </p>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">03</span>
        <h2>Compromised Data Categories</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-tags">
        <span class="dwi-tag">Full Names</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Email Addresses</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Telephone Numbers</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Home Addresses</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Nationalities</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Acquéreur Search Criteria</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Mandataire IDs</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Notaire Identifiers</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Property Prices</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Property Addresses</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Agent Fees (Honoraires)</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Mandate Numbers</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Transaction Timestamps</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Drupal Entity URLs</span>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">04</span>
        <h2>Screenshots</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-shots">
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/348962348572359876235968792837652.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/348962348572359876235968792837652.png" alt="Ledil Immobilier (ledil.immo) Database Breached: Threat Actor 888 Leaks 6,700 French Real Estate User Records">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 01</span> · darkforums.su listing by 888 announcing the Ledil breach</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/348962348572359876235968792837653.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/348962348572359876235968792837653.png" alt="Ledil Immobilier (ledil.immo) Database Breached: Threat Actor 888 Leaks 6,700 French Real Estate User Records">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 02</span> · Sample records: French emails, Drupal fields, enterprise1.ledil.immo URLs</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

  </div>
</article>
<!--kg-card-end: html-->

🧾 Today's Intelligence

Threat Intelligence
❗️
Chartered Institute of Bankers of Nigeria (CIBN) Database Breached: 250GB Including Member PII, Source Code, and ID Documents Leaked FREE
❗️
Taiseer (taiseer.co) Database Breached: Threat Actor Sorb Offering PII of Egyptian Gold Investors for Sale FREE
X/Twitter Updates
❗️
SSEDOMEX (Secretaría de Seguridad del Estado de México), the public security ministry of Mexico's most populous state, has allegedly had a decade of 911 and 089 emergency call records put up for sale on a popular cybercrime forum at $1,200 USD.
❗️
Emaar Properties and Select Group, two major Dubai based real estate developers, have allegedly had owner and rental information from their servers put up for sale on a popular cybercrime forum at $8,000 USD for both datasets combined.
❗️
INSS (Institute for National Security Studies), Israel's leading national security think tank, affiliated with Tel Aviv University, has allegedly suffered an unauthorized access of its internal research environment, with a claimed 15.92 TB archive put up for sale on a
❗️
Agoda (http://agoda.com), a Booking Holdings owned travel platform, has allegedly had 82 million customer records associated with Malaysian users put up for sale on a popular cybercrime forum.
❗️
The Gobernación del Valle del Cauca (Colombia), specifically the SAR (Sistema Administrador de Recaudo Departamental) server at http://serveriissar.valledelcauca.gov.co, has allegedly suffered an unauthorized access, with the data put up for sale on a popular cybercrime forum at $500 USD.
❗️
Vercel Breach Traced to Suspected February Infostealer Infection at Context.ai
❗️
A threat actor identified as SCTH is allegedly selling a database purportedly belonging to SGK Türkiye (Turkish Social Security Institution) containing over 20 million records.
❗️
Lovable has allegedly been breached, all the details.
❗️
Scattered Spider member, Tyler Robert Buchanan, 24, of Dundee, Scotland, pleaded guilty to one count of conspiracy to commit wire fraud and one count of aggravated identity theft.
❗️
Citizens Bank has been claimed a victim to Everest Ransomware
❗️
Frost Bank has been claimed a victim to Everest Ransomware
❗️
Cooperativa de Hospitales de Antioquia - COHAN has been claimed a victim to Qilin Ransomware
❗️
Qilin Ransomware Claims 4 companies below as victims:
💡
BlueSky's Status page has been suspended by UptimeRobot.

<style>

.dwi-report{
  --dwir-card:#ffffff;
  --dwir-surface:#f7f8fa;
  --dwir-surface-2:#eef0f4;
  --dwir-surface-3:#e3e6ec;
  --dwir-border:#e4e7ed;
  --dwir-border-bright:#d2d7df;
  --dwir-text:#0f1419;
  --dwir-text-soft:#384152;
  --dwir-text-mute:#5b6573;
  --dwir-text-faint:#8a93a3;
  --dwir-brand:#1d6fe0;
  --dwir-brand-dim:#1558b5;
  --dwir-brand-soft:rgba(29,111,224,0.08);
  --dwir-brand-border:rgba(29,111,224,0.2);
  --dwir-critical:#c8312c;
  --dwir-critical-soft:rgba(200,49,44,0.07);
  --dwir-critical-border:rgba(200,49,44,0.22);
  --dwir-score-1:#1a3a6b;
  --dwir-score-2:#2956a3;
  --dwir-score-3:#3672d1;
  --dwir-score-4:#1d6fe0;
  --dwir-score-5:#0d5bc2;
  --dwir-score-accent-soft:rgba(29,111,224,0.08);
  --dwir-warn:#b86e14;
  --dwir-warn-soft:rgba(184,110,20,0.08);
  --dwir-warn-border:rgba(184,110,20,0.25);
  --dwir-success:#2f8040;
  --dwir-success-soft:rgba(47,128,64,0.07);
  --dwir-success-border:rgba(47,128,64,0.22);
  --dwir-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(15,20,25,0.06),0 6px 24px rgba(15,20,25,0.08);
}

@media (prefers-color-scheme: dark){
  .dwi-report:not([data-dwir-theme="light"]){
    --dwir-card:#10131a;
    --dwir-surface:#161a22;
    --dwir-surface-2:#1d222c;
    --dwir-surface-3:#252b37;
    --dwir-border:#252a33;
    --dwir-border-bright:#343b48;
    --dwir-text:#e6e9ef;
    --dwir-text-soft:#b8bdc7;
    --dwir-text-mute:#8089a0;
    --dwir-text-faint:#5a6378;
    --dwir-brand:#4d9eff;
    --dwir-brand-dim:#3a7dd1;
    --dwir-brand-soft:rgba(77,158,255,0.09);
    --dwir-brand-border:rgba(77,158,255,0.22);
    --dwir-critical:#e5484d;
    --dwir-critical-soft:rgba(229,72,77,0.1);
    --dwir-critical-border:rgba(229,72,77,0.28);
    --dwir-warn:#f2a535;
    --dwir-warn-soft:rgba(242,165,53,0.1);
    --dwir-warn-border:rgba(242,165,53,0.3);
    --dwir-success:#46a758;
    --dwir-success-soft:rgba(70,167,88,0.1);
    --dwir-success-border:rgba(70,167,88,0.28);
    --dwir-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.25),0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
  }
}

.dwi-report[data-dwir-theme="dark"]{
  --dwir-card:#10131a;
  --dwir-surface:#161a22;
  --dwir-surface-2:#1d222c;
  --dwir-surface-3:#252b37;
  --dwir-border:#252a33;
  --dwir-border-bright:#343b48;
  --dwir-text:#e6e9ef;
  --dwir-text-soft:#b8bdc7;
  --dwir-text-mute:#8089a0;
  --dwir-text-faint:#5a6378;
  --dwir-brand:#4d9eff;
  --dwir-brand-dim:#3a7dd1;
  --dwir-brand-soft:rgba(77,158,255,0.09);
  --dwir-brand-border:rgba(77,158,255,0.22);
  --dwir-critical:#e5484d;
  --dwir-critical-soft:rgba(229,72,77,0.1);
  --dwir-critical-border:rgba(229,72,77,0.28);
  --dwir-score-1:#2c4770;
  --dwir-score-2:#3b67a8;
  --dwir-score-3:#4a8ae0;
  --dwir-score-4:#5ca9ff;
  --dwir-score-5:#7dc4ff;
  --dwir-score-accent-soft:rgba(92,169,255,0.1);
  --dwir-warn:#f2a535;
  --dwir-warn-soft:rgba(242,165,53,0.1);
  --dwir-warn-border:rgba(242,165,53,0.3);
  --dwir-success:#46a758;
  --dwir-success-soft:rgba(70,167,88,0.1);
  --dwir-success-border:rgba(70,167,88,0.28);
  --dwir-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.25),0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
}

.dwi-report{
  font-family:'Inter',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;
  max-width:920px;
  margin:32px auto;
  background:var(--dwir-card);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:12px;
  box-shadow:var(--dwir-shadow);
  overflow:hidden;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  line-height:1.6;
  font-feature-settings:"kern","ss01","cv11";
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
  transition:background-color .2s ease,border-color .2s ease;
}
.dwi-report *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}

.dwi-topbar{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  padding:10px 32px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  letter-spacing:0.02em;
}
.dwi-topbar-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;color:var(--dwir-text-soft)}
.dwi-topbar-status::before{
  content:'';
  width:6px;height:6px;
  background:var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:50%;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--dwir-critical-soft);
}
.dwi-topbar-right{color:var(--dwir-text-faint)}

.dwi-header{padding:48px 40px 36px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border)}
.dwi-breadcrumb{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  margin-bottom:28px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.dwi-breadcrumb a{color:var(--dwir-text-mute);text-decoration:none;transition:color .15s}
.dwi-breadcrumb a:hover{color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-breadcrumb i{font-size:9px;color:var(--dwir-text-faint)}
.dwi-breadcrumb .current{color:var(--dwir-text-soft)}

.dwi-report-label{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:10px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  letter-spacing:0.15em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:6px 12px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-brand-border);
  border-radius:4px;
  margin-bottom:24px;
}

.dwi-title{
  font-size:clamp(26px,3.5vw,36px);
  font-weight:700;
  line-height:1.2;
  letter-spacing:-0.02em;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  margin-bottom:20px;
  max-width:780px;
}

.dwi-summary{
  font-family:'Source Serif 4',Georgia,serif;
  font-size:18px;
  line-height:1.6;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  max-width:720px;
  margin-bottom:32px;
  font-weight:400;
}
.dwi-summary strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}

.dwi-meta{
  display:flex;
  gap:28px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  padding-top:24px;
  border-top:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-meta-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
.dwi-meta-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:10px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text-faint);
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
}
.dwi-meta-value{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--dwir-text)}

.dwi-content{padding:40px}

.dwi-severity{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-left:3px solid var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:6px;
  padding:20px 24px;
  margin-bottom:36px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:20px;
}
.dwi-severity-icon{
  width:40px;height:40px;
  flex-shrink:0;
  background:var(--dwir-critical-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-critical-border);
  border-radius:8px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:var(--dwir-critical);
  font-size:16px;
}
.dwi-severity-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-critical);
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:4px;
}
.dwi-severity-text{font-size:14px;color:var(--dwir-text-soft);line-height:1.5}
.dwi-severity-text strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}

.dwi-api-promo{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  padding:18px 22px;
  margin-bottom:28px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:20px;
  transition:border-color .15s;
}
.dwi-api-promo:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-api-promo-content{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px}
.dwi-api-promo-icon{
  width:36px;height:36px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-brand-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  font-size:14px;
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.dwi-api-promo-text{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px}
.dwi-api-promo-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dwir-text)}
.dwi-api-promo-description{font-size:13px;color:var(--dwir-text-mute);line-height:1.5}

.dwi-btn{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  padding:9px 16px;
  font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:500;
  text-decoration:none;
  border-radius:6px;
  border:1px solid;
  transition:all .15s ease;
  white-space:nowrap;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.dwi-btn-primary{background:var(--dwir-brand);color:#fff;border-color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-btn-primary:hover{background:var(--dwir-brand-dim);border-color:var(--dwir-brand-dim);color:#fff}
.dwi-btn-secondary{background:transparent;color:var(--dwir-text);border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-btn-secondary:hover{background:var(--dwir-surface-2);border-color:var(--dwir-text-faint);color:var(--dwir-text)}
.dwi-btn-warn{background:transparent;color:var(--dwir-warn);border-color:var(--dwir-warn-border)}
.dwi-btn-warn:hover{background:var(--dwir-warn-soft);border-color:var(--dwir-warn);color:var(--dwir-warn)}

.dwi-promo-card{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--dwir-brand-soft) 0%,transparent 60%),var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:8px;
  padding:32px;
  margin-bottom:44px;
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-promo-card::before{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--dwir-brand),transparent);
}
.dwi-promo-badge{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}
.dwi-promo-badge i{font-size:10px}
.dwi-promo-title{
  font-size:22px;
  font-weight:700;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  margin-bottom:10px;
  letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  line-height:1.3;
}
.dwi-promo-description{
  font-size:15px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  margin-bottom:22px;
  line-height:1.6;
  max-width:640px;
}

.dwi-section{margin-bottom:44px}
.dwi-section-header{
  display:flex;
  align-items:baseline;
  gap:14px;
  margin-bottom:20px;
  padding-bottom:12px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-section-number{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-faint);
  font-weight:500;
  letter-spacing:0.05em;
}
.dwi-section-header h2{
  font-size:20px;
  font-weight:700;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  margin:0;
}

.dwi-facts{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:1px;
  background:var(--dwir-border);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-fact-row{
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
  padding:12px 16px;
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  gap:12px;
  transition:background .15s;
}
.dwi-fact-row:hover{background:var(--dwir-surface-2)}
.dwi-fact-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.08em;
}
.dwi-fact-value{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  text-align:right;
}
.dwi-fact-value.accent{color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-fact-value.warn{color:var(--dwir-warn)}
.dwi-fact-value.critical{color:var(--dwir-critical)}
.dwi-flag{
  display:inline-block;
  width:20px;
  height:10px;
  margin-right:6px;
  vertical-align:-1px;
  border-radius:2px;
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  box-sizing:content-box;
}

.dwi-prose p{
  font-size:15.5px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  line-height:1.75;
  margin-bottom:18px;
}
.dwi-prose p strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}
.dwi-prose ul{
  list-style:none;
  padding:0;
  margin:20px 0;
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-prose ul li{
  position:relative;
  padding:14px 20px 14px 48px;
  font-size:14.5px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  line-height:1.6;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-prose ul li:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.dwi-prose ul li::before{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  left:20px;top:21px;
  width:14px;height:14px;
  border:1.5px solid var(--dwir-brand);
  border-radius:3px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
}
.dwi-prose ul li::after{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  left:25px;top:25px;
  width:4px;height:7px;
  border-right:1.5px solid var(--dwir-brand);
  border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--dwir-brand);
  transform:rotate(45deg);
}
.dwi-prose ul li strong{
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  font-weight:600;
  display:block;
  margin-bottom:3px;
  font-size:13px;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.05em;
}

.dwi-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
.dwi-tag{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  padding:7px 12px;
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:4px;
  transition:all .15s;
}
.dwi-tag:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-critical);background:var(--dwir-critical-soft)}
.dwi-tag::before{
  content:'';
  width:5px;height:5px;
  background:var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:50%;
}

.dwi-shots{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:16px}
.dwi-shot{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .15s;
}
.dwi-shot:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-shot a{display:block;position:relative;text-decoration:none}
.dwi-shot img{width:100%;display:block}
.dwi-shot-caption{
  padding:12px 16px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  border-top:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
}
.dwi-shot-caption .fig{color:var(--dwir-brand);font-weight:600}

@media(max-width:768px){
  .dwi-report{margin:16px;border-radius:10px}
  .dwi-topbar{padding:10px 20px;font-size:10px}
  .dwi-topbar-right{display:none}
  .dwi-header{padding:32px 24px 28px}
  .dwi-content{padding:28px 24px}
  .dwi-title{font-size:24px}
  .dwi-summary{font-size:16px}
  .dwi-meta{gap:18px}
  .dwi-facts{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .dwi-api-promo,.dwi-severity{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}
  .dwi-severity{align-items:flex-start}
  .dwi-btn{width:100%;justify-content:center}
  .dwi-promo-card{padding:24px}
  .dwi-promo-title{font-size:18px}
}
</style>

<article class="dwi-report">

  <div class="dwi-topbar">
    <span class="dwi-topbar-status">Active Threat</span>
    <span class="dwi-topbar-right">Report ID: DWI-2026-0420-25</span>
  </div>

  <header class="dwi-header">
    <div class="dwi-report-label">
      <i class="fas fa-file-shield" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      Threat Intelligence Report
    </div>

    <h1 class="dwi-title">Taiseer (taiseer.co) Database Breached: Threat Actor Sorb Offering PII of Egyptian Gold Investors for Sale</h1>

    <img src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/235798623985769283756987235698721598716.png" alt="Taiseer (taiseer.co) Database Breached: Threat Actor Sorb Offering PII of Egyptian Gold Investors for Sale"><p class="dwi-summary">A threat actor operating under the alias <strong>Sorb</strong> is selling the database of <strong>Taiseer</strong> (taiseer.co), the Egyptian Sharia-compliant fractional gold-savings fintech. The listing claims <strong>71,000 user records</strong> with full names, emails, phone numbers, <strong>bcrypt password hashes</strong>, addresses, gold balances, and <strong>27,000 national ID card records</strong> with scanned front-and-back images — offered for <strong>$400 with escrow</strong>.</p>

    <div class="dwi-meta">
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Published</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value"><time datetime="2026-04-20T21:54:36Z">Apr 20, 2026 · 21:54 UTC</time></span>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Origin</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value">Egypt</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Sector</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value">Fintech / Gold Investment</span>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Read Time</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value">6 min</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <div class="dwi-content">

    
    <div class="dwi-severity" role="region" aria-label="Severity assessment">
      <div class="dwi-severity-icon" aria-hidden="true">
        <i class="fas fa-triangle-exclamation"></i>
      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="dwi-severity-label">Critical Severity</div>
        <p class="dwi-severity-text"><strong>71,000 investor records</strong> from Egypt's Sharia-compliant fractional gold-savings platform, including bcrypt password hashes, 27,000 national ID scans, and per-user gold balances. The seller also claims continued access to the environment. High risk of account takeover, identity theft, and targeted fraud against high-balance holders.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    
    <aside class="dwi-api-promo api-promo">
      <div class="dwi-api-promo-content">
        <div class="dwi-api-promo-icon" aria-hidden="true"><i class="fas fa-code"></i></div>
        <div class="dwi-api-promo-text">
          <span class="dwi-api-promo-title">API Access Available</span>
          <span class="dwi-api-promo-description">Threat intelligence endpoints, ransomware feeds, and IOC data for programmatic integration.</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <a href="https://darkwebinformer.com/api-details/" class="dwi-btn dwi-btn-secondary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">View Details <i class="fas fa-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></i></a>
    </aside>

    
    <aside class="dwi-promo-card promo-card">
      <div class="dwi-promo-badge">
        <i class="fas fa-shield-halved" aria-hidden="true"></i>
        Premium Intelligence
      </div>
      <h2 class="dwi-promo-title">Real-time breach tracking, primary-source evidence, and expert analysis.</h2>
      <p class="dwi-promo-description">Built for security professionals, researchers, and journalists. Unlock the complete threat feed, ransomware feed, and original claim URLs.</p>
      <a href="https://darkwebinformer.com/pricing" class="dwi-btn dwi-btn-primary" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Subscribe <i class="fas fa-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></i></a>
    </aside>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">01</span>
        <h2>Incident Summary</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-facts">
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Date & Time</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">2026-04-20 21:54 UTC</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Threat Actor</span><span class="dwi-fact-value warn">Sorb</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Victim</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Taiseer (taiseer.co)</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Industry</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Fintech / Gold Investment</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Category</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Data Breach</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Total Users</span><span class="dwi-fact-value critical">71,000</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">ID Cards</span><span class="dwi-fact-value critical">27,000</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Unique Emails</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">71,000</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Unique Phones</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">71,000</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Price</span><span class="dwi-fact-value warn">$400 USD</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Escrow</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Yes</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Access</span><span class="dwi-fact-value critical">Ongoing</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Forum</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">spear.cx</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Contact</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">t.me/sorblines</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Network</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Open Web</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Country</span><span class="dwi-fact-value"><svg class="dwi-flag" viewbox="0 0 60 40" aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" preserveaspectratio="none"><rect width="60" height="13.33" y="0" fill="#CE1126"/><rect width="60" height="13.33" y="13.33" fill="#ffffff"/><rect width="60" height="13.33" y="26.67" fill="#000000"/></svg> Egypt</span></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section dwi-prose">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">02</span>
        <h2>Incident Overview</h2>
      </div>
      <p>A threat actor going by <strong>Sorb</strong> is selling a database attributed to <strong>Taiseer</strong> (taiseer.co), a Cairo-based fintech founded in 2023 and headquartered at the Nile University campus. Taiseer operates a Sharia-compliant mobile app that lets Egyptian savers buy investment-grade gold in fractions, describing itself in its own marketing as "the first digital platform for saving in gold."</p>
      <p>According to the post, the dataset contains <strong>71,000 user records</strong> with 71,000 unique emails, 71,000 unique phone numbers, and <strong>27,000 unique national ID card records</strong>. Sample rows published by the actor confirm the following schema and data categories:</p>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Core Account Data</strong>Full names (in Arabic script), email addresses, Egyptian mobile numbers (002012 prefix), bcrypt password hashes, and Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) push tokens tied to individual devices.</li>
        <li><strong>KYC Identity Records</strong>Egyptian national ID numbers (14-digit format), ID photo front and back filenames, nationality, residence country, and city — 27,000 verified identities in total.</li>
        <li><strong>Demographic Data</strong>Gender, date of birth (sample DOBs span 1947–1999), job title (Marketing Consultant, Product Designer, banker, engineer, graphic designer, application designer, among others), and home address.</li>
        <li><strong>Financial & Gold Balances</strong>Current gold balances, out-balance, current and reserved gold shares, referral data, transaction history, and account timestamps for created_at and updated_at events.</li>
        <li><strong>Administrative Flags</strong>Admin verification status, rejection reasons, basic-info flags, and referral link IDs — the internal fields a full database dump would expose to a buyer attempting to identify high-value or recently onboarded accounts.</li>
      </ul>
      <p>The listing is priced at <strong>$400 USD with escrow available</strong>, and the actor notes that buyer access "does not affect the price" — language that the seller interprets as indicating ongoing or retained access to the source environment rather than a one-off dump. The actor directs interested buyers to <strong>t.me/sorblines</strong> for contact and advertises a broader data-leak channel at t.me/totaldataleaks. The combination of <strong>bcrypt password hashes, scanned national ID cards, and per-user gold balances</strong> is the most damaging element: it pairs an account takeover vector (via hash cracking or credential stuffing against other services) with verified identity documents suitable for KYC-bypass fraud, and a known target value in physical gold. For a platform of Taiseer's size, this represents effectively the entire customer base. </p>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">03</span>
        <h2>Compromised Data Categories</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-tags">
        <span class="dwi-tag">Full Names</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Email Addresses</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Phone Numbers</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Bcrypt Password Hashes</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">National ID Numbers</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">ID Photo Scans (Front/Back)</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Home Addresses</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Date of Birth</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Gender</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Job Titles</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Gold Balances</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Gold Shares</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Transaction History</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">FCM Push Tokens</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Referral Data</span>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">04</span>
        <h2>Screenshots</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-shots">
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/235798623985769283756987235698721598712.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/235798623985769283756987235698721598712.png" alt="Taiseer (taiseer.co) Database Breached: Threat Actor Sorb Offering PII of Egyptian Gold Investors for Sale">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 01</span> · spear.cx listing header and seller profile (Sorb, Leaksmaster)</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/235798623985769283756987235698721598713.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/235798623985769283756987235698721598713.png" alt="Taiseer (taiseer.co) Database Breached: Threat Actor Sorb Offering PII of Egyptian Gold Investors for Sale">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 02</span> · Listing body — volumes, field list, $400 price, escrow, Telegram contact</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/235798623985769283756987235698721598714.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/235798623985769283756987235698721598714.png" alt="Taiseer (taiseer.co) Database Breached: Threat Actor Sorb Offering PII of Egyptian Gold Investors for Sale">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 03</span> · KYC/ID-verification sample — id_number, job, gender, DOB, photo filenames</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dwi-shot">
          <a href="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/235798623985769283756987235698721598715.png" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
            <img loading="lazy" src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/235798623985769283756987235698721598715.png" alt="Taiseer (taiseer.co) Database Breached: Threat Actor Sorb Offering PII of Egyptian Gold Investors for Sale">
          </a>
          <div class="dwi-shot-caption">
            <span><span class="fig">FIG 04</span> · Users table sample — bcrypt hashes, FCM tokens, gold shares, admin flags</span>
            <i class="fas fa-up-right-from-square" aria-hidden="true"></i>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

  </div>
</article>

  --dwir-brand-soft:rgba(77,158,255,0.09);
  --dwir-brand-border:rgba(77,158,255,0.22);
  --dwir-critical:#e5484d;
  --dwir-critical-soft:rgba(229,72,77,0.1);
  --dwir-critical-border:rgba(229,72,77,0.28);
  --dwir-score-1:#2c4770;
  --dwir-score-2:#3b67a8;
  --dwir-score-3:#4a8ae0;
  --dwir-score-4:#5ca9ff;
  --dwir-score-5:#7dc4ff;
  --dwir-score-accent-soft:rgba(92,169,255,0.1);
  --dwir-warn:#f2a535;
  --dwir-warn-soft:rgba(242,165,53,0.1);
  --dwir-warn-border:rgba(242,165,53,0.3);
  --dwir-success:#46a758;
  --dwir-success-soft:rgba(70,167,88,0.1);
  --dwir-success-border:rgba(70,167,88,0.28);
  --dwir-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.25),0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
}

.dwi-report{
  font-family:'Inter',-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',sans-serif;
  max-width:920px;
  margin:32px auto;
  background:var(--dwir-card);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:12px;
  box-shadow:var(--dwir-shadow);
  overflow:hidden;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  line-height:1.6;
  font-feature-settings:"kern","ss01","cv11";
  -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing:grayscale;
  transition:background-color .2s ease,border-color .2s ease;
}
.dwi-report *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}

.dwi-topbar{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  padding:10px 32px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  letter-spacing:0.02em;
}
.dwi-topbar-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;color:var(--dwir-text-soft)}
.dwi-topbar-status::before{
  content:'';
  width:6px;height:6px;
  background:var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:50%;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--dwir-critical-soft);
}
.dwi-topbar-right{color:var(--dwir-text-faint)}

.dwi-header{padding:48px 40px 36px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border)}
.dwi-breadcrumb{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  margin-bottom:28px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.dwi-breadcrumb a{color:var(--dwir-text-mute);text-decoration:none;transition:color .15s}
.dwi-breadcrumb a:hover{color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-breadcrumb i{font-size:9px;color:var(--dwir-text-faint)}
.dwi-breadcrumb .current{color:var(--dwir-text-soft)}

.dwi-report-label{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:10px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  letter-spacing:0.15em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:6px 12px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-brand-border);
  border-radius:4px;
  margin-bottom:24px;
}

.dwi-title{
  font-size:clamp(26px,3.5vw,36px);
  font-weight:700;
  line-height:1.2;
  letter-spacing:-0.02em;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  margin-bottom:20px;
  max-width:780px;
}

.dwi-summary{
  font-family:'Source Serif 4',Georgia,serif;
  font-size:18px;
  line-height:1.6;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  max-width:720px;
  margin-bottom:32px;
  font-weight:400;
}
.dwi-summary strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}

.dwi-meta{
  display:flex;
  gap:28px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  padding-top:24px;
  border-top:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-meta-item{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
.dwi-meta-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:10px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text-faint);
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
}
.dwi-meta-value{font-size:14px;font-weight:500;color:var(--dwir-text)}

.dwi-content{padding:40px}

.dwi-severity{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-left:3px solid var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:6px;
  padding:20px 24px;
  margin-bottom:36px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:20px;
}
.dwi-severity-icon{
  width:40px;height:40px;
  flex-shrink:0;
  background:var(--dwir-critical-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-critical-border);
  border-radius:8px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:var(--dwir-critical);
  font-size:16px;
}
.dwi-severity-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-critical);
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:4px;
}
.dwi-severity-text{font-size:14px;color:var(--dwir-text-soft);line-height:1.5}
.dwi-severity-text strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}

.dwi-api-promo{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  padding:18px 22px;
  margin-bottom:28px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:20px;
  transition:border-color .15s;
}
.dwi-api-promo:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-api-promo-content{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px}
.dwi-api-promo-icon{
  width:36px;height:36px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-brand-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  font-size:14px;
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.dwi-api-promo-text{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px}
.dwi-api-promo-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:var(--dwir-text)}
.dwi-api-promo-description{font-size:13px;color:var(--dwir-text-mute);line-height:1.5}

.dwi-btn{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  padding:9px 16px;
  font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:500;
  text-decoration:none;
  border-radius:6px;
  border:1px solid;
  transition:all .15s ease;
  white-space:nowrap;
  cursor:pointer;
}
.dwi-btn-primary{background:var(--dwir-brand);color:#fff;border-color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-btn-primary:hover{background:var(--dwir-brand-dim);border-color:var(--dwir-brand-dim);color:#fff}
.dwi-btn-secondary{background:transparent;color:var(--dwir-text);border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-btn-secondary:hover{background:var(--dwir-surface-2);border-color:var(--dwir-text-faint);color:var(--dwir-text)}
.dwi-btn-warn{background:transparent;color:var(--dwir-warn);border-color:var(--dwir-warn-border)}
.dwi-btn-warn:hover{background:var(--dwir-warn-soft);border-color:var(--dwir-warn);color:var(--dwir-warn)}

.dwi-promo-card{
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--dwir-brand-soft) 0%,transparent 60%),var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:8px;
  padding:32px;
  margin-bottom:44px;
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-promo-card::before{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--dwir-brand),transparent);
}
.dwi-promo-badge{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:600;
  color:var(--dwir-brand);
  letter-spacing:0.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}
.dwi-promo-badge i{font-size:10px}
.dwi-promo-title{
  font-size:22px;
  font-weight:700;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  margin-bottom:10px;
  letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  line-height:1.3;
}
.dwi-promo-description{
  font-size:15px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  margin-bottom:22px;
  line-height:1.6;
  max-width:640px;
}

.dwi-section{margin-bottom:44px}
.dwi-section-header{
  display:flex;
  align-items:baseline;
  gap:14px;
  margin-bottom:20px;
  padding-bottom:12px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-section-number{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-faint);
  font-weight:500;
  letter-spacing:0.05em;
}
.dwi-section-header h2{
  font-size:20px;
  font-weight:700;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  margin:0;
}

.dwi-facts{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:1px;
  background:var(--dwir-border);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-fact-row{
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
  padding:12px 16px;
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  gap:12px;
  transition:background .15s;
}
.dwi-fact-row:hover{background:var(--dwir-surface-2)}
.dwi-fact-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:11px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.08em;
}
.dwi-fact-value{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:13px;
  font-weight:500;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  text-align:right;
}
.dwi-fact-value.accent{color:var(--dwir-brand)}
.dwi-fact-value.warn{color:var(--dwir-warn)}
.dwi-fact-value.critical{color:var(--dwir-critical)}
.dwi-flag{
  display:inline-block;
  width:20px;
  height:10px;
  margin-right:6px;
  vertical-align:-1px;
  border-radius:2px;
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  box-sizing:content-box;
}

.dwi-prose p{
  font-size:15.5px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  line-height:1.75;
  margin-bottom:18px;
}
.dwi-prose p strong{color:var(--dwir-text);font-weight:600}
.dwi-prose ul{
  list-style:none;
  padding:0;
  margin:20px 0;
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.dwi-prose ul li{
  position:relative;
  padding:14px 20px 14px 48px;
  font-size:14.5px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-soft);
  line-height:1.6;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
}
.dwi-prose ul li:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.dwi-prose ul li::before{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  left:20px;top:21px;
  width:14px;height:14px;
  border:1.5px solid var(--dwir-brand);
  border-radius:3px;
  background:var(--dwir-brand-soft);
}
.dwi-prose ul li::after{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;
  left:25px;top:25px;
  width:4px;height:7px;
  border-right:1.5px solid var(--dwir-brand);
  border-bottom:1.5px solid var(--dwir-brand);
  transform:rotate(45deg);
}
.dwi-prose ul li strong{
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  font-weight:600;
  display:block;
  margin-bottom:3px;
  font-size:13px;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:0.05em;
}

.dwi-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px}
.dwi-tag{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text);
  padding:7px 12px;
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:4px;
  transition:all .15s;
}
.dwi-tag:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-critical);background:var(--dwir-critical-soft)}
.dwi-tag::before{
  content:'';
  width:5px;height:5px;
  background:var(--dwir-critical);
  border-radius:50%;
}

.dwi-shots{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:16px}
.dwi-shot{
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  border:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  border-radius:6px;
  overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .15s;
}
.dwi-shot:hover{border-color:var(--dwir-border-bright)}
.dwi-shot a{display:block;position:relative;text-decoration:none}
.dwi-shot img{width:100%;display:block}
.dwi-shot-caption{
  padding:12px 16px;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,Menlo,monospace;
  font-size:12px;
  color:var(--dwir-text-mute);
  border-top:1px solid var(--dwir-border);
  background:var(--dwir-surface);
  display:flex;
  justify-content:space-between;
  align-items:center;
}
.dwi-shot-caption .fig{color:var(--dwir-brand);font-weight:600}

@media(max-width:768px){
  .dwi-report{margin:16px;border-radius:10px}
  .dwi-topbar{padding:10px 20px;font-size:10px}
  .dwi-topbar-right{display:none}
  .dwi-header{padding:32px 24px 28px}
  .dwi-content{padding:28px 24px}
  .dwi-title{font-size:24px}
  .dwi-summary{font-size:16px}
  .dwi-meta{gap:18px}
  .dwi-facts{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .dwi-api-promo,.dwi-severity{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start}
  .dwi-severity{align-items:flex-start}
  .dwi-btn{width:100%;justify-content:center}
  .dwi-promo-card{padding:24px}
  .dwi-promo-title{font-size:18px}
}
</style>

    <div class="dwi-report-label">
      <i class="fas fa-file-shield" aria-hidden="true"></i>
      Threat Intelligence Report
    </div>

    <h1 class="dwi-title">Chartered Institute of Bankers of Nigeria (CIBN) Database Breached: 250GB Including Member PII, Source Code, and ID Documents Leaked</h1>

    <img src="https://storage.ghost.io/c/6b/16/6b16ac9c-cd67-432f-b0f3-bbec941084ff/content/images/2026/04/879234659872365987623598723549874.png" alt="Chartered Institute of Bankers of Nigeria (CIBN) Database Breached: 250GB Including Member PII, Source Code, and ID Documents Leaked"><p class="dwi-summary">A threat actor operating under the alias <strong>Rabid</strong> is offering the complete 250GB database of the Chartered Institute of Bankers of Nigeria (CIBN), Nigeria's apex professional banking body. The leak reportedly includes member names, email addresses, membership details, source code, and scanned ID documents and academic certificates.</p>

    <div class="dwi-meta">
      <div class="dwi-meta-item">
        <span class="dwi-meta-label">Published</span>
        <span class="dwi-meta-value"><time datetime="2026-04-20T20:14:56Z">Apr 20, 2026 · 20:14 UTC</time></span>

      </div>
      <div>
        <div class="dwi-severity-label">Critical Severity</div>
        <p class="dwi-severity-text"><strong>250GB</strong> of data exposing members of Nigeria's chartered banking body, including scanned identity and academic documents alongside platform source code. High risk of identity theft, credential fraud, and follow-on intrusion.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    
    <aside class="dwi-api-promo api-promo">

    <aside class="dwi-promo-card promo-card">

    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">01</span>
        <h2>Incident Summary</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-facts">
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Date & Time</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">2026-04-20 20:14 UTC</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Threat Actor</span><span class="dwi-fact-value warn">Rabid</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Victim</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Chartered Institute of Bankers of Nigeria</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Industry</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Banking / Professional Assoc.</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Category</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Data Breach</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Total Volume</span><span class="dwi-fact-value critical">250GB+</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Scope</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Full Database</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Sale Type</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Hidden / Gated Access</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Sample Host</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">gofile.io</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Price</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Undisclosed</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Network</span><span class="dwi-fact-value">Open Web</span></div>
        <div class="dwi-fact-row"><span class="dwi-fact-label">Country</span><span class="dwi-fact-value"><svg class="dwi-flag" viewbox="0 0 60 30" aria-hidden="true" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" preserveaspectratio="none"><rect width="20" height="30" fill="#008751"/><rect x="20" width="20" height="30" fill="#ffffff"/><rect x="40" width="20" height="30" fill="#008751"/></svg> Nigeria</span></div>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section dwi-prose">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">02</span>
        <h2>Incident Overview</h2>
      </div>
      <p>A threat actor going by <strong>Rabid</strong> is advertising the full database of the <strong>Chartered Institute of Bankers of Nigeria (CIBN)</strong>, the country's apex professional body for the banking and finance industry. Established by an Act of the National Assembly, CIBN is responsible for certifying and regulating professional standards for bankers across Nigeria, and its membership spans executives, mid-career professionals, and students pursuing chartered qualifications in the country's financial sector. The dataset being offered totals over <strong>250GB</strong> and is described by the actor as the institute's entire database.</p>
      <p>According to the listing, the exposed material spans several distinct categories:</p>
      <ul>
        <li><strong>Member Personal Data</strong>Names, email addresses, and full membership records belonging to CIBN members and applicants.</li>
        <li><strong>Identity Documents</strong>Scanned government-issued ID documents submitted during the membership verification process.</li>
        <li><strong>Academic Certificates</strong>University statements of result, degree certificates, and professional membership certificates from institutions including the University of Ilorin, Tansian University, and the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Nigeria (ICAN), shown in the sample.</li>
        <li><strong>Source Code</strong>Platform source code associated with CIBN's online systems, raising the possibility of follow-on attacks against the institute's live infrastructure.</li>
        <li><strong>Operational Documents</strong>Membership details and internal documents bundled within the 250GB archive.</li>
      </ul>
      <p>The combination of scanned identity documents with matching academic credentials is particularly severe. In the Nigerian financial sector, banker certification documents are a recognised part of know-your-customer and employment verification workflows, and a leaked corpus of genuine ID-plus-certificate pairs provides attackers with ready-made templates for synthetic identity fraud, fake professional impersonation, and targeted business email compromise against the banks where these individuals are employed. The simultaneous exposure of CIBN's source code further compounds the risk, as it may reveal authentication logic, internal endpoints, or hard-coded secrets that could enable a second-stage intrusion. </p>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">03</span>
        <h2>Compromised Data Categories</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="dwi-tags">
        <span class="dwi-tag">Full Names</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Email Addresses</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Membership Details</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Scanned ID Documents</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">University Transcripts</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Degree Certificates</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Professional Certificates</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Platform Source Code</span>
        <span class="dwi-tag">Internal Documents</span>
      </div>
    </section>

    
    <section class="dwi-section">
      <div class="dwi-section-header">
        <span class="dwi-section-number">04</span>

      </div>
